69// forward declarations
70static bool handleBrief(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &);

157
158typedef bool (*DocCmdFunc)(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &name, const StringVector &optList);
159
160enum class CommandSpacing
161{
162 Invisible, // command sets some property but does not appear in the output.
163 Inline, // command appears inline in the output which can be a brief description.
164 Block, // command starts a new paragraphs / ends a brief description.
165 XRef // command is a cross reference (todo, bug, test, xrefitem).
166};
167
168struct DocCmdMap
169{
170 DocCmdMap(DocCmdFunc h,CommandSpacing s) : handler(h), spacing(s) {}
171 DocCmdFunc handler;
172 CommandSpacing spacing;
173};
174
175// map of command to handler function
176static const std::map< std::string, DocCmdMap > docCmdMap =
177{
178 // command name handler function command spacing
179 { "addindex", { &handleAddIndex, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
180 { "addtogroup", { &handleAddToGroup, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
181 { "anchor", { &handleAnchor, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
182 { "ianchor", { &handleAnchor, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
183 { "arg", { 0, CommandSpacing::Block }},
184 { "attention", { 0, CommandSpacing::Block }},
185 { "author", { 0, CommandSpacing::Block }},
186 { "authors", { 0, CommandSpacing::Block }},
187 { "brief", { &handleBrief, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
188 { "bug", { &handleBug, CommandSpacing::XRef }},
189 { "callergraph", { &handleCallergraph, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
190 { "callgraph", { &handleCallgraph, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
191 { "category", { &handleCategory, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
192 { "cite", { &handleCite, CommandSpacing::Inline }},
193 { "class", { &handleClass, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
194 { "code", { &handleFormatBlock, CommandSpacing::Block }},
195 { "icode", { &handleFormatBlock, CommandSpacing::Block }},
196 { "concept", { &handleConcept, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
197 { "copybrief", { &handleCopyBrief, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
198 { "copydetails", { &handleCopyDetails, CommandSpacing::Block }},
199 { "copydoc", { &handleCopyDoc, CommandSpacing::Block }},
200 { "copyright", { 0, CommandSpacing::Block }},
201 { "showdate", { 0, CommandSpacing::Inline }},
202 { "date", { 0, CommandSpacing::Block }},
203 { "def", { &handleDef, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
204 { "defgroup", { &handleDefGroup, CommandSpacing::Invisible }},
205 { "deprecated", { &handleDeprecated, CommandSpacing::XRef }},
206 { "details", { &handleDetails, CommandSpacing::Block }},

328
329#define YY_NO_INPUT 1
330#define YY_NO_UNISTD_H 1
331#define YY_NEVER_INTERACTIVE 1
332
333
334enum XRefKind
335{
336 XRef_Item,
337 XRef_Todo,
338 XRef_Test,
339 XRef_Bug,
340 XRef_Deprecated,
341 XRef_None
342};
343
344enum OutputContext
345{
346 OutputDoc,
347 OutputBrief,
348 OutputXRef,
349 OutputInbody
350};
351
352enum GuardType
353{
354 Guard_If,
355 Guard_IfNot,
356 Guard_ElseIf
357};
358
359class GuardedSection
360{
361 public:
362 GuardedSection(bool parentVisible)
363 : m_parentVisible(parentVisible) {}
364 void setEnabled(bool enabled) { m_enabled = enabled; }
365 bool isEnabled() const { return m_enabled; }
366 void setEnabledFound() { m_enabledFound = true; }
367 bool isEnabledFound() const { return m_enabledFound; }
368 bool parentVisible() const { return m_parentVisible; }
369 void setElse() { m_hasElse = true; }
370 bool hasElse() const { return m_hasElse; }
371
372 private:
373 bool m_parentVisible;
374 bool m_enabledFound = false;
375 bool m_enabled = false;
376 bool m_hasElse = false;
377};
378
379/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
380 *
381 * statics
382 */
383
384struct commentscanYY_state
385{
386 OutlineParserInterface *langParser = 0; // the language parser that is calling us
387 QCString inputString; // input string
388 QCString currentCmd; // the command used
389 int inputPosition = 0; // read pointer
390 QCString fileName; // file name that is read from
391 int lineNr = 0; // line number in the input
392 bool inBody = FALSE; // was the comment found inside the body of a function?
393 OutputContext inContext; // are we inside the brief, details or xref part
394 bool briefEndsAtDot = FALSE; // does the brief description stop at a dot?
395 QCString formulaText; // Running text of a formula
396 QCString formulaEnv; // environment name
397 int formulaNewLines = 0; // amount of new lines in the formula
398 QCString *pOutputString = 0; // pointer to string to which the output is appended.
399 QCString outputXRef; // temp argument of todo/test/../xrefitem commands
400 QCString blockName; // preformatted block name (e.g. verbatim, latexonly,...)
401 XRefKind xrefKind = XRef_Item; // kind of cross-reference command
402 XRefKind newXRefKind = XRef_Item; //
403 GuardType guardType = Guard_If; // kind of guards for conditional section
404 QCString functionProto; // function prototype
405 std::stack<GuardedSection> guards; // tracks nested conditional sections (if,ifnot,..)
406 Entry *current = 0; // working entry
407
408 bool needNewEntry = FALSE;
409
410 QCString sectionLabel;
411 QCString sectionTitle;
412 int sectionLevel = 0;
413 QCString xrefItemKey;
414 QCString newXRefItemKey;
415 QCString xrefItemTitle;
416 QCString xrefListTitle;
417 Protection protection = Protection::Public;
418
419 bool xrefAppendFlag = FALSE;
420 bool inGroupParamFound = FALSE;
421 int braceCount = 0;
422 bool insidePre = FALSE;
423 bool parseMore = FALSE;
424 int condCount = 0;
425
426 int commentCount = 0;
427 QCString spaceBeforeCmd;
428 QCString spaceBeforeIf;
429 QCString copyDocArg;
430
431 QCString guardExpr;
432 int roundCount = 0;
433 std::vector<int> HTMLDetailsSummary;
434
435 bool insideParBlock = FALSE;
436 bool inInternalDocs = FALSE;
437 int prevPosition = 0;
438 DocGroup docGroup;
439 bool markdownSupport = TRUE;
440
441 QCString raiseWarning;
442
443 QCString anchorTitle;
444 QCString htmlAnchorStr;
445 bool htmlAnchor = false;
446};
447
448
449static std::mutex g_sectionMutex;
450static std::mutex g_formulaMutex;
451static std::mutex g_citeMutex;
452
453//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
454
455static QCString stripQuotes(const char *s);
456static bool getDocSectionName(int s);
457static SectionType sectionLevelToType(int level);
458static void stripTrailingWhiteSpace(QCString &s);
459
460static void initParser(yyscan_t yyscanner);
461static bool makeStructuralIndicator(yyscan_t yyscanner,Entry::Sections s);
462static void lineCount(yyscan_t yyscanner);
463static void addXRefItem(yyscan_t yyscanner,
464 const QCString &listName,const QCString &itemTitle,
465 const QCString &listTitle,bool append);
466static QCString addFormula(yyscan_t yyscanner);
467static void checkFormula(yyscan_t yyscanner);
468static void addSection(yyscan_t yyscanner);
469static inline void setOutput(yyscan_t yyscanner,OutputContext ctx);
470static void addAnchor(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &anchor, const QCString &title="");
471static inline void addOutput(yyscan_t yyscanner,const char *s);
472static inline void addOutput(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &s);
473static inline void addOutput(yyscan_t yyscanner,char c);
474static void endBrief(yyscan_t yyscanner,bool addToOutput=TRUE);
475static void handleGuard(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &expr);
476static int yyread(yyscan_t yyscanner,char *buf,int max_size);
477static void addCite(yyscan_t yyscanner);
478static void addIline(yyscan_t yyscanner,int lineNr);
479static void addIlineBreak(yyscan_t yyscanner,int lineNr);
480
481#define unput_string(yytext,yyleng) do { for (int i=(int)yyleng-1;i>=0;i--) unput(yytext[i]); } while(0)
482
483//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
484
485#undef YY_INPUT
486#define YY_INPUT(buf,result,max_size) result=yyread(yyscanner,buf,max_size);
487
488// otherwise the filename would be the name of the converted file (*.cpp instead of *.l)
489static inline const char *getLexerFILE() {return __FILE__;}
490#include "doxygen_lex.h"

util.h
A bunch of utility functions.
492%}
493
494 /* start command character */
495CMD ("\\"|"@")
496XREFCMD {CMD}("bug"|"deprecated"|"test"|"todo"|"xrefitem")
497PRE [pP][rR][eE]
498TABLE [tT][aA][bB][lL][eE]
499P [pP]
500UL [uU][lL]
501OL [oO][lL]
502DL [dD][lL]
503IMG [iI][mM][gG]
504HR [hH][rR]
505PARA [pP][aA][rR][aA]
506CODE [cC][oO][dD][eE]
507CAPTION [cC][aA][pP][tT][iI][oO][nN]
508CENTER [cC][eE][nN][tT][eE][rR]
509DIV [dD][iI][vV]
510DETAILS [dD][eE][tT][aA][iI][lL][sS]
511DETAILEDHTML {CENTER}|{DIV}|{PRE}|{UL}|{TABLE}|{OL}|{DL}|{P}|[Hh][1-6]|{IMG}|{HR}|{PARA}
512DETAILEDHTMLOPT {CODE}
513SUMMARY [sS][uU][mM][mM][aA][rR][yY]
514REMARKS [rR][eE][mM][aA][rR][kK][sS]
515AHTML [aA]{BN}*
516ANCHTML ([iI][dD]|[nN][aA][mM][eE])"="("\""{LABELID}"\""|"'"{LABELID}"'"|{LABELID})
517BN [ \t\n\r]
518BL [ \t\r]*"\n"
519B [ \t]
520Bopt {B}*
521BS ^(({B}*"/""/")?)(({B}*"*"+)?){B}*
522ATTR ({B}+[^>\n]*)?
523DOCNL "\n"|"\\ilinebr"
524LC "\\"{B}*"\n"
525NW [^a-z_A-Z0-9]
526FILESCHAR [a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xFF\\:\\\/\-\+=@&#]
527FILEECHAR [a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xFF\-\+=@&#]
528FILE ({FILESCHAR}*{FILEECHAR}+("."{FILESCHAR}*{FILEECHAR}+)*)|("\""[^\n\"]*"\"")
529ID [$a-z_A-Z\x80-\xFF][$a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xFF]*
530LABELID [a-z_A-Z\x80-\xFF][a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xFF\-]*
531CITESCHAR [a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xFF\-\?]
532CITEECHAR [a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xFF\-\+:\/\?]*
533CITEID {CITESCHAR}{CITEECHAR}*("."{CITESCHAR}{CITEECHAR}*)*|"\""{CITESCHAR}{CITEECHAR}*("."{CITESCHAR}{CITEECHAR}*)*"\""
534SCOPEID {ID}({ID}*{BN}*"::"{BN}*)*({ID}?)
535SCOPENAME "$"?(({ID}?{BN}*("::"|"."){BN}*)*)((~{BN}*)?{ID})
536TMPLSPEC "<"{BN}*[^>]+{BN}*">"
537MAILADDR ("mailto:")?[a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xff.+-]+"@"[a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xff-]+("."[a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xff\-]+)+[a-z_A-Z0-9\x80-\xff\-]+
538RCSTAG "$"{ID}":"[^\n$]+"$"
539
540 // C start comment
541CCS "/\*"
542 // C end comment
543CCE "*\/"
544 // Cpp comment
545CPPC "/\/"
546
547 // end of section title with asterisk
548STAopt [^\n@\\*]*
549 // end of section title without asterisk
550STopt [^\n@\\]*
551
552%option noyywrap
553
554 /* comment parsing states. */
555%x Comment
556%x PageDocArg1
557%x PageDocArg2
558%x RelatesParam1
559%x ClassDocArg1
560%x ClassDocArg2
561%x ClassDocArg3
562%x CategoryDocArg1
563%x XRefItemParam1
564%x XRefItemParam2
565%x XRefItemParam3
566%x FileDocArg1
567%x ParamArg1
568%x EnumDocArg1
569%x NameSpaceDocArg1
570%x PackageDocArg1
571%x ConceptDocArg1
572%x GroupDocArg1
573%x GroupDocArg2
574%x SectionLabel
575%x SectionTitle
576%x SubpageLabel
577%x SubpageTitle
578%x FormatBlock
579%x LineParam
580%x GuardParam
581%x GuardParamEnd
582%x SkipGuardedSection
583%x SkipInternal
584%x NameParam
585%x InGroupParam
586%x FnParam
587%x OverloadParam
588%x InheritParam
589%x ExtendsParam
590%x ReadFormulaShort
591%x ReadFormulaRound
592%x ReadFormulaLong
593%x AnchorLabel
594%x HtmlComment
595%x HtmlA
596%x SkipLang
597%x CiteLabel
598%x CopyDoc
599%x GuardExpr
600%x CdataSection
601%x Noop
602%x RaiseWarning
603%x Qualifier
604
605%%
606
607 /* What can happen in while parsing a comment block:
608 * commands (e.g. @page, or \page)
609 * escaped commands (e.g. @@page or \\page).
610 * formulas (e.g. \f$...\f$ \f[...\f] \f{...\f} \f(...\f) )
611 * directories (e.g. \doxygen\src\‍)
612 * autolist end. (e.g. a dot on an otherwise empty line)
613 * newlines.
614 * end of brief description due to blank line.
615 * end of brief description due to some command (@command, or <command>).
616 * words and whitespace and other characters (#,?!, etc).
617 * grouping commands (e.g. @{ and @})
618 * language switch (e.g. \~english or \~).
619 * mail address (e.g. doxygen@gmail.com).
620 * quoted text, such as "foo@bar"
621 * XML commands, <summary></summary><remarks></remarks>
622 */
623
624<Comment>{CMD}{CMD}[a-z_A-Z]+{B}* { // escaped command
625 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
626 }
627<Comment>{CMD}{CMD}"~"[a-z_A-Z]* { // escaped command
628 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
629 }
630<Comment>{MAILADDR} { // mail address
631 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
632 }
633<Comment>"\""[^"\n]*"\"" { // quoted text
634 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
635 }
636<Comment>("\\"[a-z_A-Z]+)+"\\" { // directory (or chain of commands!)
637 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
638 }
639<Comment>"<"{DETAILEDHTML}{ATTR}">" { // HTML command that ends a brief description
640 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
641 // continue with the same input
642 REJECT;
643 }
644<Comment>"<"{DETAILEDHTMLOPT}{ATTR}">" { // HTML command that ends a brief description
645 if (yyextra->current->lang==SrcLangExt_CSharp)
646 {
647 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
648 }
649 // continue with the same input
650 REJECT;
651 }
SrcLangExt_CSharp
@ SrcLangExt_CSharp
Definition types.h:46
652<Comment>"<"{DETAILS}{ATTR}">" { // start of a HTML style details description
653 yyextra->HTMLDetailsSummary.push_back(0);
654 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
655 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
656 }
657<Comment>"</"{DETAILS}">" { // end of a HTML style details description
658 if (!yyextra->HTMLDetailsSummary.empty())
659 {
660 yyextra->HTMLDetailsSummary.pop_back();
661 }
662 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
663 }
664<Comment>"<"{AHTML} { // potential start of HTML anchor, see issue 9200
665 yyextra->htmlAnchorStr = yytext;
666 yyextra->htmlAnchor = false;
667 BEGIN(HtmlA);
668 }
669<HtmlA>{ANCHTML} { // only labels that can be converted to doxygen anchor
670 yyextra->htmlAnchorStr += yytext;
671 QCString tag(yytext);
672 int s=tag.find("=");
673 char c=tag[s+1];
674 QCString id;
675 if (c=='\'' || c=='"') // valid start
676 {
677 int e=tag.find(c,s+2);
678 if (e!=-1) // found matching end
679 {
680 id=tag.mid(s+2,e-s-2); // extract id
681 addAnchor(yyscanner,id);
682 }
683 }
684 else
685 {
686 id=tag.mid(s+1);
687 addAnchor(yyscanner,id);
688 }
689 if (!id.isEmpty() && !yyextra->htmlAnchor)
690 {
691 // only use first analogous to what is in docparser
692 addOutput(yyscanner,"@anchor ");
693 addOutput(yyscanner,id.data());
694 addOutput(yyscanner," ");
695 yyextra->htmlAnchor = true;
696 }
697 }
QCString::find
int find(char c, int index=0, bool cs=TRUE) const
Definition qcstring.cpp:43
698<HtmlA>("\""[^\n\"]*"\""|"'"[^\n']*"'") {
699 yyextra->htmlAnchorStr += yytext;
700 }
701<HtmlA>">"|"/>" {
702 if (!yyextra->htmlAnchor)
703 {
704 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->htmlAnchorStr);
705 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
706 }
707 else
708 {
709 if (yyleng == 1) // to keep <a></a> pairs, otherwise single </a> present
710 {
711 addOutput(yyscanner,"<a>");
712 }
713 }
714 BEGIN(Comment);
715 }
716<HtmlA>{DOCNL} { // newline
717 yyextra->htmlAnchorStr += yytext;
718 if (*yytext == '\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
719 }
720<HtmlA>. { // catch-all for anything else
721 yyextra->htmlAnchorStr += yytext;
722 }
723<Comment>"<"{SUMMARY}">" { // start of a .NET XML style brief description
724 if (yyextra->HTMLDetailsSummary.empty())
725 {
726 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputBrief);
727 }
728 else // HTML5 style <summary> as part of <details> section.
729 {
730 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
731 }
732 }
733<Comment>"<"{REMARKS}">" { // start of a .NET XML style detailed description
734 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
735 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
736 }
737<Comment>"</"{SUMMARY}">" { // start of a .NET XML style detailed description
738 if (!yyextra->HTMLDetailsSummary.empty())
739 {
740 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
741 }
742 else
743 {
744 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
745 }
746 }
747<Comment>"</"{REMARKS}">" { // end of a brief or detailed description
748 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
749 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
750 }
751<Comment>"<"{CAPTION}{ATTR}">" {
752 QCString tag(yytext);
753 int s=tag.find("id=");
754 if (s!=-1) // command has id attribute
755 {
756 char c=tag[s+3];
757 if (c=='\'' || c=='"') // valid start
758 {
759 int e=tag.find(c,s+4);
760 if (e!=-1) // found matching end
761 {
762 QCString id=tag.mid(s+4,e-s-4); // extract id
763 addAnchor(yyscanner,id);
764 }
765 }
766 }
767 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
768 }
QCString::mid
QCString mid(size_t index, size_t len=static_cast< size_t >(-1)) const
Definition qcstring.h:224
769<Comment>"<"{PRE}{ATTR}">" {
770 yyextra->insidePre=TRUE;
771 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
772 }
773<Comment>"</"{PRE}">" {
774 yyextra->insidePre=FALSE;
775 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
776 }
777<Comment>{RCSTAG} { // RCS tag which end a brief description
778 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
779 REJECT;
780 }
781<Comment>"<!--" {
782 BEGIN(HtmlComment);
783 }
784<Comment>"<!\[CDATA\[" {
785 BEGIN(CdataSection);
786 }
787<Comment>{B}*{CMD}"endinternal"{B}* {
788 addOutput(yyscanner," \\endinternal ");
789 if (!yyextra->inInternalDocs)
790 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
791 "found \\endinternal without matching \\internal"
792 );
793 yyextra->inInternalDocs = FALSE;
794 }
warn
#define warn(file, line, fmt,...)
Definition message.h:59
795<Comment>{B}*"\\ilinebr"{B}* { // preserve spacing around \\ilinebr
796 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
797 }
798<Comment>{B}*{CMD}[a-z_A-Z]+"{"[^}]*"}"{B}* |
799<Comment>{B}*{CMD}[a-z_A-Z]+{B}* { // potentially interesting command
800 // the {B}* in the front was added for bug620924
801 QCString fullMatch = QCString(yytext);
802 int idx = fullMatch.find('{');
803 /* handle `\f{` and `@f{` as special cases */
804 if ((idx > 1) && (yytext[idx-1] == 'f') && (yytext[idx-2] == '\\' || yytext[idx-2] =='@')) REJECT;
805 int idxEnd = fullMatch.find("}",idx+1);
806 QCString cmdName;
807 StringVector optList;
808 if (idx == -1) // no options
809 {
810 cmdName = QCString(yytext).stripWhiteSpace().mid(1); // to remove {CMD}
811 }
812 else // options present
813 {
814 cmdName = fullMatch.left(idx).stripWhiteSpace().mid(1); // to remove {CMD}
815 QCString optStr = fullMatch.mid(idx+1,idxEnd-idx-1).stripWhiteSpace();
816 optList = split(optStr.str(),",");
817 }
818 auto it = docCmdMap.find(cmdName.str());
819 //printf("lookup command '%s' found=%d\n",qPrint(cmdName),it!=docCmdMap.end());
820 if (it!=docCmdMap.end()) // special action is required
821 {
822 int i=0;
823 while (yytext[i]==' ' || yytext[i]=='\t') i++;
824 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd = QCString(yytext).left(i);
825 CommandSpacing spacing = it->second.spacing;
826 if ((spacing==CommandSpacing::Block || spacing==CommandSpacing::XRef) &&
827 !(yyextra->inContext==OutputXRef && cmdName=="parblock"))
828 {
829 yyextra->briefEndsAtDot=FALSE;
830 bool insideXRef = yyextra->inContext==OutputXRef && spacing==CommandSpacing::XRef;
831 // this command forces the end of brief description
832 setOutput(yyscanner,insideXRef ? OutputXRef : OutputDoc);
833 }
834 //if (i>0) addOutput(yyscanner,QCString(yytext).left(i)); // removed for bug 689341
835 if (it->second.handler && it->second.handler(yyscanner, cmdName, optList))
836 {
837 // implicit split of the comment block into two
838 // entries. Restart the next block at the start
839 // of this command.
840 yyextra->parseMore=TRUE;
841
842 // yuk, this is probably not very portable across lex implementations,
843 // but we need to know the position in the input buffer where this
844 // rule matched.
845 // for flex 2.5.33+ we should use YY_CURRENT_BUFFER_LVALUE
846#if YY_FLEX_MAJOR_VERSION>=2 && (YY_FLEX_MINOR_VERSION>5 || (YY_FLEX_MINOR_VERSION==5 && YY_FLEX_SUBMINOR_VERSION>=33))
847 yyextra->inputPosition=yyextra->prevPosition + (int)(yy_bp - YY_CURRENT_BUFFER_LVALUE->yy_ch_buf);
848#else
849 yyextra->inputPosition=yyextra->prevPosition + (int)(yy_bp - yy_current_buffer->yy_ch_buf);
850#endif
851 yyterminate();
852 }
853 else if (it->second.handler==0)
854 {
855 // command without handler, to be processed
856 // later by parsedoc.cpp
857 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
858 }
859 }
860 else // command not relevant
861 {
862 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
863 }
864 }
QCString::stripWhiteSpace
QCString stripWhiteSpace() const
returns a copy of this string with leading and trailing whitespace removed

QCString::str
const std::string & str() const
Definition qcstring.h:493

QCString left(size_t len) const

split
static std::vector< QCString > split(const QCString &str, const QCString &sep, bool allowEmptyEntries=FALSE, bool cleanup=TRUE)

865<Comment>{B}*({CMD}{CMD})"f"[$\[{] { // escaped formula command
866 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
867 }
868<Comment>{B}*{CMD}"~"[a-z_A-Z-]* { // language switch command
869 QCString langId = QCString(yytext).stripWhiteSpace().mid(2);
870 if (!langId.isEmpty() &&
871 qstricmp(Config_getEnumAsString(OUTPUT_LANGUAGE),langId)!=0)
872 { // enable language specific section
873 if (!Config_isAvailableEnum(OUTPUT_LANGUAGE,langId))
874 {
875 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
876 "non supported language '%s' specified in '%s'",langId.data(),QCString(yytext).stripWhiteSpace().data());
877 }
878 BEGIN(SkipLang);
879 }
880 }

881<Comment>{B}*{CMD}"f{"[^}\n]+"}"("{"?) { // start of a formula with custom environment
882 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
883 yyextra->formulaText="\\begin";
884 yyextra->formulaEnv=QCString(yytext).stripWhiteSpace().mid(2);
885 if (yyextra->formulaEnv.at(yyextra->formulaEnv.length()-1)=='{')
886 {
887 // remove trailing open brace
888 yyextra->formulaEnv=yyextra->formulaEnv.left(yyextra->formulaEnv.length()-1);
889 }
890 yyextra->formulaText+=yyextra->formulaEnv;
891 yyextra->formulaNewLines=0;
892 BEGIN(ReadFormulaLong);
893 }
894<Comment>{B}*{CMD}"f$" { // start of a inline formula
895 yyextra->formulaText="$";
896 yyextra->formulaNewLines=0;
897 BEGIN(ReadFormulaShort);
898 }
899<Comment>{B}*{CMD}"f(" { // start of a inline formula
900 yyextra->formulaText="";
901 yyextra->formulaNewLines=0;
902 BEGIN(ReadFormulaRound);
903 }
904<Comment>{B}*{CMD}"f[" { // start of a block formula
905 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
906 yyextra->formulaText="\\[";
907 yyextra->formulaNewLines=0;
908 BEGIN(ReadFormulaLong);
909 }
910<Comment>{B}*{CMD}"{" { // begin of a group
911 //yyextra->langParser->handleGroupStartCommand(yyextra->memberGroupHeader);
912 yyextra->docGroup.open(yyextra->current,yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr);
913 }
914<Comment>{B}*{CMD}"}" { // end of a group
915 //yyextra->langParser->handleGroupEndCommand();
916 yyextra->docGroup.close(yyextra->current,yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,TRUE);
917 yyextra->docGroup.clearHeader();
918 yyextra->parseMore=TRUE;
919 yyextra->needNewEntry = TRUE;
920#if YY_FLEX_MAJOR_VERSION>=2 && (YY_FLEX_MINOR_VERSION>5 || (YY_FLEX_MINOR_VERSION==5 && YY_FLEX_SUBMINOR_VERSION>=33))
921 yyextra->inputPosition=yyextra->prevPosition + (int)(yy_bp - YY_CURRENT_BUFFER_LVALUE->yy_ch_buf) + (int)strlen(yytext);
922#else
923 yyextra->inputPosition=yyextra->prevPosition + (int)(yy_bp - yy_current_buffer->yy_ch_buf) + (int)strlen(yytext);
924#endif
925 yyterminate();
926 }
927<Comment>{B}*{CMD}[$@\\&~<>#%] { // escaped character
928 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
929 }
930<Comment>[a-z_A-Z]+ { // normal word
931 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
932 }
933<Comment>^{B}*"."{Bopt}/\n { // explicit end autolist: e.g " ."
934 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
935 }
936<Comment>^{B}*[1-9][0-9]*"."{B}+ |
937<Comment>^{B}*[*+]{B}+ { // start of autolist
938 if (!yyextra->markdownSupport)
939 {
940 REJECT;
941 }
942 else
943 {
944 if (yyextra->inContext!=OutputXRef)
945 {
946 yyextra->briefEndsAtDot=FALSE;
947 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
948 }
949 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
950 }
951 }
952<Comment>^{B}*"-"{B}+ { // start of autolist
953 if (yyextra->inContext!=OutputXRef)
954 {
955 yyextra->briefEndsAtDot=FALSE;
956 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
957 }
958 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
959 }
960<Comment>^{B}*([\-:|]{B}*)*("--"|"---")({B}*[\-:|])*{Bopt}/\n { // horizontal line (dashed)
961 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
962 }
963<Comment>{CMD}"---" { // escaped mdash
964 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
965 }
966<Comment>{CMD}"--" { // escaped mdash
967 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
968 }
969<Comment>"---" { // mdash
970 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->insidePre || yyextra->markdownSupport ? yytext : "&mdash;");
971 }
972<Comment>"--" { // ndash
973 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->insidePre || yyextra->markdownSupport ? yytext : "&ndash;");
974 }
975<Comment>"-#"{B}+ { // numbered item
976 if (yyextra->inContext!=OutputXRef)
977 {
978 yyextra->briefEndsAtDot=FALSE;
979 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
980 }
981 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
982 }
983<Comment>("."+)[a-z_A-Z0-9\‍)] { // . at start or in the middle of a word, or ellipsis
984 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
985 }
986<Comment>".\\"[ \t] { // . with escaped space.
987 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext[0]);
988 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext[2]);
989 }
990<Comment>"."[,:;] { // . with some puntuations such as "e.g.," or "e.g.:"
991 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
992 }
993<Comment>"...\\"[ \t] { // ellipsis with escaped space.
994 addOutput(yyscanner,"... ");
995 }
996<Comment>"..."/[^\.] { // ellipsis
997 addOutput(yyscanner,"...");
998 }
999<Comment>".."[\.]?/[^ \t\n] { // internal ellipsis
1000 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1001 }
1002<Comment>(\n|\\ilinebr)({B}*(\n|\\ilinebr))+ { // at least one blank line (or blank line command)
1003 if (yyextra->inContext==OutputXRef)
1004 {
1005 // see bug 613024, we need to put the newlines after ending the XRef section.
1006 if (!yyextra->insideParBlock) setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
1007 yy_size_t i;
1008 for (i=0;i<(yy_size_t)yyleng;)
1009 {
1010 if (yytext[i]=='\n') addOutput(yyscanner,'\n'),i++;
1011 else if (strcmp(yytext+i,"\\ilinebr")==0) addOutput(yyscanner,"\\ilinebr"),i+=8;
1012 else i++;
1013 }
1014 }
1015 else if (yyextra->inContext!=OutputBrief)
1016 {
1017 yy_size_t i;
1018 for (i=0;i<(yy_size_t)yyleng;)
1019 {
1020 if (yytext[i]=='\n') addOutput(yyscanner,'\n'),i++;
1021 else if (strcmp(yytext+i,"\\ilinebr")==0) addOutput(yyscanner,"\\ilinebr"),i+=8;
1022 else i++;
1023 }
1024 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
1025 }
1026 else // yyextra->inContext==OutputBrief
1027 { // only go to the detailed description if we have
1028 // found some brief description and not just whitespace
1029 endBrief(yyscanner,TRUE);
1030 }
1031 lineCount(yyscanner);
1032 }
1033<Comment>"." { // potential end of a JavaDoc style comment
1034 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
1035 if (yyextra->briefEndsAtDot)
1036 {
1037 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
1038 yyextra->briefEndsAtDot=FALSE;
1039 }
1040 }
1041<Comment>{DOCNL} { // newline
1042 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1043 if (*yytext == '\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1044 }
1045<Comment>. { // catch-all for anything else
1046 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
1047 }
1048
1049
1050 /* -------------- Rules for handling HTML comments ----------- */
1051
1052<HtmlComment>"--"[!]?">"{B}* { BEGIN( Comment ); }
1053<HtmlComment>{DOCNL} {
1054 if (*yytext=='\n')
1055 {
1056 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
1057 yyextra->lineNr++;
1058 }
1059 }
1060<HtmlComment>[^\\\n\-]+ { // ignore unimportant characters
1061 }
1062<HtmlComment>. { // ignore every else
1063 }
1064
1065<CdataSection>"\]\]>" {
1066 BEGIN( Comment );
1067 }
1068<CdataSection>{DOCNL} {
1069 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1070 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1071 }
1072<CdataSection>[<>&] { // the special XML characters for iwhich the CDATA section is especially used
1073 addOutput(yyscanner,'\\');
1074 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
1075 }
1076<CdataSection>[^\\\n\]<>&]+ {
1077 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1078 }
1079<CdataSection>. {
1080 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
1081 }
1082
1083 /* -------------- Rules for handling formulas ---------------- */
1084
1085<ReadFormulaShort>{CMD}"f$" { // end of inline formula
1086 yyextra->formulaText+="$";
1087 addOutput(yyscanner," "+addFormula(yyscanner));
1088 BEGIN(Comment);
1089 }
1090<ReadFormulaRound>{CMD}"f)" { // end of inline formula
1091 addOutput(yyscanner," "+addFormula(yyscanner));
1092 BEGIN(Comment);
1093 }
1094<ReadFormulaLong>{CMD}"f]" { // end of block formula
1095 yyextra->formulaText+="\\]";
1096 addOutput(yyscanner," "+addFormula(yyscanner));
1097 BEGIN(Comment);
1098 }
1099<ReadFormulaLong>{CMD}"f}" { // end of custom env formula
1100 yyextra->formulaText+="\\end";
1101 yyextra->formulaText+=yyextra->formulaEnv;
1102 addOutput(yyscanner," "+addFormula(yyscanner));
1103 BEGIN(Comment);
1104 }
1105<ReadFormulaLong,ReadFormulaShort,ReadFormulaRound>[^\\@\n]+ { // any non-special character
1106 yyextra->formulaText+=yytext;
1107 }
1108<ReadFormulaLong,ReadFormulaShort,ReadFormulaRound>\n { // new line
1109 yyextra->formulaNewLines++;
1110 yyextra->formulaText+=*yytext;
1111 yyextra->lineNr++;
1112 addIline(yyscanner,yyextra->lineNr);
1113 }
1114<ReadFormulaLong,ReadFormulaShort,ReadFormulaRound>. { // any other character
1115 yyextra->formulaText+=*yytext;
1116 }
1117
1118 /* ------------ handle argument of enum command --------------- */
1119
1120<EnumDocArg1>{SCOPEID} { // handle argument
1121 yyextra->current->name = yytext;
1122 BEGIN( Comment );
1123 }
1124<EnumDocArg1>{LC} { // line continuation
1125 yyextra->lineNr++;
1126 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1127 }
1128<EnumDocArg1>{DOCNL} { // missing argument
1129 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1130 "missing argument after \\enum."
1131 );
1132 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);

1281 /* --------- handle arguments of {def,add,weak}group commands --------- */
1282
1283<GroupDocArg1>{LABELID}(".html"?) { // group name
1284 yyextra->current->name = yytext;
1285 //lastDefGroup.groupname = yytext;
1286 //lastDefGroup.pri = yyextra->current->groupingPri();
1287 // the .html stuff is for Qt compatibility
1288 if (yyextra->current->name.endsWith(".html"))
1289 {
1290 yyextra->current->name=yyextra->current->name.left(yyextra->current->name.length()-5);
1291 }
1292 yyextra->current->type.resize(0);
1293 BEGIN(GroupDocArg2);
1294 }
1295<GroupDocArg1>"\\"{B}*"\n" { // line continuation
1296 yyextra->lineNr++;
1297 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1298 }
1299<GroupDocArg1>{DOCNL} { // missing argument!
1300 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1301 "missing group name after %s",
1302 yyextra->current->groupDocCmd()
1303 );
1304 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1305 //if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1306 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
1307 BEGIN( Comment );
1308 }
1309<GroupDocArg1>. { // ignore other stuff
1310 }
1311<GroupDocArg2>"\\"{B}*"\n" { // line continuation
1312 yyextra->lineNr++;
1313 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1314 }
1315<GroupDocArg2>[^\n\\]+ { // title (stored in type)
1316 yyextra->current->type += yytext;
1317 yyextra->current->type = yyextra->current->type.stripWhiteSpace();
1318 }
1319<GroupDocArg2>{DOCNL} {
1320 if ( yyextra->current->groupDocType==Entry::GROUPDOC_NORMAL &&
1321 yyextra->current->type.isEmpty()
1322 ) // defgroup requires second argument
1323 {
1324 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1325 "missing title after "
1326 "\\defgroup %s", qPrint(yyextra->current->name)
1327 );
1328 }
1329 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
1330 //if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1331 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1332 BEGIN( Comment );
1333 }

1334<GroupDocArg2>. { // title (stored in type)

1338
1339 /* --------- handle arguments of page/mainpage command ------------------- */
1340
1341<PageDocArg1>[^\n]*"\\ilinebr @ianchor"\{[^\]\n]*\}{B}{FILE} { // special case where the Markdown processor has rewritten
1342 // "@page label Title" as
1343 // "@page md_label Title\ilinebr @ianchor{Title} label"
1344 QCString text = yytext;
1345 int start = text.find('{');
1346 int end = text.find('}',start+1);
1347 yyextra->current->name = text.mid(end+2);
1348 int istart = yyextra->current->name.find("\\ilinebr");
1349 if (istart != -1)
1350 {
1351 QCString rest = yyextra->current->name.mid(istart);
1352 unput_string(rest,rest.length());
1353 yyextra->current->name = yyextra->current->name.mid(0,istart);
1354 }
1355 yyextra->current->args = text.mid(start+1,end-start-1);
1356 //printf("name='%s' title='%s'\n",qPrint(yyextra->current->name),qPrint(yyextra->current->args));
1357 BEGIN( PageDocArg2 );
1358 }

Returns the length of the string, not counting the 0-terminator.

1400 addOutput(yyscanner," , ");

1525 /* ----- handle arguments of the qualifier command ----- */
1526<Qualifier>{LABELID} { // unquoted version, simple label
1527 yyextra->current->qualifiers.push_back(yytext);
1528 BEGIN( Comment );
1529 }
1530<Qualifier>"\""[^\"]*"\"" { // quotes version, add without quotes
1531 std::string inp(yytext);
1532 yyextra->current->qualifiers.push_back(inp.substr(1,yyleng-2));
1533 BEGIN( Comment );
1534 }
1535<Qualifier>{DOCNL} { // missing argument
1536 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1537 "Missing argument of '\\%s' command",qPrint(yyextra->currentCmd)
1538 );
1539 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
1540 BEGIN( Comment );
1541 }
1542<Qualifier>. {
1543 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1544 "Argument of '\\%s' command should be quoted",qPrint(yyextra->currentCmd)
1545 );
1546 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
1547 BEGIN( Comment );
1548 }
1549 /* ----- handle arguments of the relates(also)/addindex commands ----- */
1550
1551<LineParam>{CMD}{CMD} { // escaped command
1552 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1553 }
1554<LineParam>{DOCNL} { // end of argument
1555 //if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1556 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1557 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
1558 BEGIN( Comment );
1559 }
1560<LineParam>{LC} { // line continuation
1561 yyextra->lineNr++;
1562 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1563 }
1564<LineParam>({CMD}{CMD}){ID} { // escaped command
1565 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1566 }
1567<LineParam>. { // ignore other stuff
1568 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
1569 }
1570
1571 /* ----- handle arguments of the section/subsection/.. commands ------- */
1572
1573<SectionLabel>{LABELID} { // first argument
1574 yyextra->sectionLabel=yytext;
1575 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1576 yyextra->sectionTitle.resize(0);
1577 BEGIN(SectionTitle);
1578 }
1579<SectionLabel>{DOCNL} { // missing argument
1580 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1581 "\\section command has no label"
1582 );
1583 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1584 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1585 BEGIN( Comment );
1586 }
1587<SectionLabel>. { // invalid character for section label
1588 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1589 "Invalid or missing section label"
1590 );
1591 BEGIN(Comment);
1592 }
1593<SectionTitle>{STAopt}/"\n" { // end of section title
1594 addSection(yyscanner);
1595 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1596 BEGIN( Comment );
1597 }
1598<SectionTitle>{STopt}/"\\ilinebr" { // end of section title
1599 addSection(yyscanner);
1600 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1601 BEGIN( Comment );
1602 }
1603<SectionTitle>{LC} { // line continuation
1604 yyextra->lineNr++;
1605 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1606 }
1607<SectionTitle>[^\n@\\]* { // any character without special meaning
1608 yyextra->sectionTitle+=yytext;
1609 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1610 }
1611<SectionTitle>({CMD}{CMD}){ID} { // escaped command
1612 yyextra->sectionTitle+=&yytext[1];
1613 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1614 }
1615<SectionTitle>{CMD}[$@\\&~<>#%] { // unescaped character
1616 yyextra->sectionTitle+=yytext[1];
1617 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1618 }
1619<SectionTitle>. { // anything else
1620 yyextra->sectionTitle+=yytext;
1621 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
1622 }
1623
1624 /* ----- handle arguments of the subpage command ------- */
1625
1626<SubpageLabel>{LABELID} { // first argument
1627 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1628 // we add subpage labels as a kind of "inheritance" relation to prevent
1629 // needing to add another list to the Entry class.
1630 yyextra->current->extends.push_back(BaseInfo(QCString(yytext),Protection::Public,Specifier::Normal));
1631 BEGIN(SubpageTitle);
1632 }
BaseInfo
This class stores information about an inheritance relation.

Specifier::Normal
@ Normal

1635 "\\subpage command has no label"
1636 );
1637 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1638 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1639 BEGIN( Comment );
1640 }
1641<SubpageLabel>. {
1642 unput(yytext[0]);
1643 BEGIN( Comment );
1644 }
1645<SubpageTitle>{DOCNL} { // no title, end command
1646 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1647 BEGIN( Comment );
1648 }
1649<SubpageTitle>[ \t]*"\""[^\"\n]*"\"" { // add title, end of command
1650 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1651 BEGIN( Comment );
1652 }
1653<SubpageTitle>. { // no title, end of command
1654 unput(*yytext);
1655 BEGIN( Comment );
1656 }
1657
1658 /* ----- handle arguments of the anchor command ------- */
1659
1660<AnchorLabel>{LABELID} { // found argument
1661 addAnchor(yyscanner,QCString(yytext), yyextra->anchorTitle);
1662 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1663 BEGIN( Comment );
1664 }
1665<AnchorLabel>{DOCNL} { // missing argument
1666 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1667 "\\anchor command has no label"
1668 );
1669 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1670 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1671 BEGIN( Comment );
1672 }
1673<AnchorLabel>. { // invalid character for anchor label
1674 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1675 "Invalid or missing anchor label"
1676 );
1677 BEGIN(Comment);
1678 }
1679
1680
1681 /* ----- handle arguments of the preformatted block commands ------- */
1682
1683<FormatBlock>{CMD}("endverbatim"|"endiverbatim"|"endiliteral"|"endlatexonly"|"endhtmlonly"|"endxmlonly"|"enddocbookonly"|"endrtfonly"|"endmanonly"|"enddot"|"endcode"|"endicode"|"endmsc")/{NW} { // possible ends
1684 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1685 if (&yytext[4]==yyextra->blockName) // found end of the block
1686 {
1687 BEGIN(Comment);
1688 }
1689 }
1690<FormatBlock>{CMD}"enduml" {
1691 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1692 if (yyextra->blockName=="startuml") // found end of the block
1693 {
1694 BEGIN(Comment);
1695 }
1696 }
1697<FormatBlock>[^ \@\*\/\\\n]* { // some word
1698 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1699 }
1700<FormatBlock>{DOCNL} { // new line
1701 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1702 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1703 }
1704<FormatBlock>{CCS} { // start of a C-comment
1705 if (!(yyextra->blockName=="code" || yyextra->blockName=="verbatim" ||
1706 yyextra->blockName=="icode" || yyextra->blockName=="iverbatim"||
1707 yyextra->blockName=="iliteral"
1708 )
1709 ) yyextra->commentCount++;
1710 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1711 }
1712<FormatBlock>{CCE} { // end of a C-comment
1713 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
1714 if (!(yyextra->blockName=="code" || yyextra->blockName=="verbatim" ||
1715 yyextra->blockName=="icode" || yyextra->blockName=="iverbatim"||
1716 yyextra->blockName=="iliteral"
1717 )
1718 )
1719 {
1720 yyextra->commentCount--;
1721 if (yyextra->commentCount<0)
1722 {
1723 QCString endTag = "end"+yyextra->blockName;
1724 if (yyextra->blockName=="startuml") endTag="enduml";
1725 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1726 "found */ without matching /* while inside a \\%s block! Perhaps a missing \\%s?",qPrint(yyextra->blockName),qPrint(endTag));
1727 }
1728 }
1729 }
1730<FormatBlock>. {
1731 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
1732 }
1733<FormatBlock><<EOF>> {
1734 QCString endTag = "end"+yyextra->blockName;
1735 if (yyextra->blockName=="startuml") endTag="enduml";
1736 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1737 "reached end of comment while inside a \\%s block; check for missing \\%s tag!",
1738 qPrint(yyextra->blockName),qPrint(endTag)
1739 );
1740 yyterminate();
1741 }
1742
1743 /* ----- handle arguments of if/ifnot commands ------- */
1744
1745<GuardParam>{B}*"(" {
1746 yyextra->guardExpr=yytext;
1747 yyextra->roundCount=1;
1748 BEGIN(GuardExpr);
1749 }
1750<GuardExpr>[^()]* {
1751 yyextra->guardExpr+=yytext;
1752 lineCount(yyscanner);
1753 }
1754<GuardExpr>"(" {
1755 yyextra->guardExpr+=yytext;
1756 yyextra->roundCount++;
1757 }
1758<GuardExpr>")" {
1759 yyextra->guardExpr+=yytext;
1760 yyextra->roundCount--;
1761 if (yyextra->roundCount==0)
1762 {
1763 handleGuard(yyscanner,yyextra->guardExpr);
1764 }
1765 }
1766<GuardExpr>\n {
1767 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1768 "invalid expression '%s' for yyextra->guards",qPrint(yyextra->guardExpr));
1769 unput(*yytext);
1770 BEGIN(GuardParam);
1771 }
1772<GuardParam>{B}*[a-z_A-Z0-9.\-]+ { // parameter of if/ifnot yyextra->guards
1773 handleGuard(yyscanner,QCString(yytext));
1774 }
1775<GuardParam>{DOCNL} { // end of argument
1776 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1777 //next line is commented out due to bug620924
1778 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1779 addIlineBreak(yyscanner,yyextra->lineNr);
1780 unput(*yytext);
1781 handleGuard(yyscanner,QCString());
1782 }
1783<GuardParam>{LC} { // line continuation
1784 yyextra->lineNr++;
1785 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1786 }
1787<GuardParam>. { // empty condition
1788 unput(*yytext);
1789 handleGuard(yyscanner,QCString());
1790 }
1791<GuardParamEnd>{B}*{DOCNL} {
1792 lineCount(yyscanner);
1793 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf.resize(0);
1794 addIlineBreak(yyscanner,yyextra->lineNr);
1795 BEGIN(Comment);
1796 }
1797<GuardParamEnd>{B}* {
1798 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeIf.isEmpty()) // needed for 665313 in combination with bug620924
1799 {
1800 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeIf);
1801 }
1802 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf.resize(0);
1803 addIlineBreak(yyscanner,yyextra->lineNr);
1804 BEGIN(Comment);
1805 }
1806<GuardParamEnd>. {
1807 unput(*yytext);
1808 addIlineBreak(yyscanner,yyextra->lineNr);
1809 BEGIN(Comment);
1810 }
1811
1812 /* ----- handle skipping of conditional sections ------- */
1813
1814<SkipGuardedSection>{CMD}"ifnot"/{NW} {
1815 yyextra->guardType = Guard_IfNot;
1816 yyextra->guards.push(GuardedSection(false));
1817 BEGIN( GuardParam );
1818 }
1819<SkipGuardedSection>{CMD}"if"/{NW} {
1820 yyextra->guardType = Guard_If;
1821 yyextra->guards.push(GuardedSection(false));
1822 BEGIN( GuardParam );
1823 }
1824<SkipGuardedSection>{CMD}"endif"/{NW} {
1825 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
1826 {
1827 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1828 "found \\endif without matching start command");
1829 BEGIN( Comment );
1830 }
1831 else
1832 {
1833 yyextra->guards.pop();
1834 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
1835 {
1836 BEGIN( GuardParamEnd );
1837 }
1838 else
1839 {
1840 if (yyextra->guards.top().isEnabled())
1841 {
1842 BEGIN( GuardParamEnd );
1843 }
1844 else
1845 {
1846 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
1847 }
1848 }
1849 }
1850 }
1851<SkipGuardedSection>{CMD}"else"/{NW} {
1852 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
1853 {
1854 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1855 "found \\else without matching start command");
1856 }
1857 else if (yyextra->guards.top().hasElse())
1858 {
1859 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1860 "found multiple \\else commands in same \\if construct");
1861 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
1862 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
1863 }
1864 else if (!yyextra->guards.top().parentVisible())
1865 {
1866 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
1867 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
1868 }
1869 else
1870 {
1871 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf = yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd;
1872 yyextra->guards.top().setElse();
1873 if (!yyextra->guards.top().parentVisible())
1874 {
1875 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
1876 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
1877 }
1878 else if (yyextra->guards.top().isEnabledFound())
1879 {
1880 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
1881 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
1882 }
1883 else
1884 {
1885 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(true);
1886 BEGIN( GuardParamEnd );
1887 }
1888 }
1889 }
1890<SkipGuardedSection>{CMD}"elseif"/{NW} {
1891 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
1892 {
1893 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1894 "found \\elseif without matching start command");
1895 }
1896 else if (yyextra->guards.top().hasElse())
1897 {
1898 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
1899 "found \\elseif command after \\else command was given in \\if construct");
1900 yyextra->guardType = Guard_ElseIf;
1901 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf = yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd;
1902 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
1903 BEGIN( GuardParam );
1904 }
1905 else
1906 {
1907 yyextra->guardType = Guard_ElseIf;
1908 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf = yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd;
1909 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
1910 BEGIN( GuardParam );
1911 }
1912 }
1913<SkipGuardedSection>{DOCNL} { // skip line
1914 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1915 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1916 }
1917<SkipGuardedSection>[^ \\@\n]+ { // skip non-special characters
1918 }
1919<SkipGuardedSection>. { // any other character
1920 }
1921
1922
1923 /* ----- handle skipping of internal section ------- */
1924
1925<SkipInternal>{DOCNL} { // skip line
1926 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1927 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1928 }
1929<SkipInternal>[@\\]"if"/[ \t] {
1930 yyextra->condCount++;
1931 }
1932<SkipInternal>[@\\]"ifnot"/[ \t] {
1933 yyextra->condCount++;
1934 }
1935<SkipInternal>[@\\]/"endif" {
1936 yyextra->condCount--;
1937 if (yyextra->condCount<0) // handle conditional section around of \internal, see bug607743
1938 {
1939 unput('\\');
1940 BEGIN(Comment);
1941 }
1942 }
1943<SkipInternal>[@\\]/"section"[ \t] {
1944 if (yyextra->sectionLevel>0)
1945 {
1946 unput('\\');
1947 BEGIN(Comment);
1948 }
1949 }
1950<SkipInternal>[@\\]/"subsection"[ \t] {
1951 if (yyextra->sectionLevel>1)
1952 {
1953 unput('\\');
1954 BEGIN(Comment);
1955 }
1956 }
1957<SkipInternal>[@\\]/"subsubsection"[ \t] {
1958 if (yyextra->sectionLevel>2)
1959 {
1960 unput('\\');
1961 BEGIN(Comment);
1962 }
1963 }
1964<SkipInternal>[@\\]/"paragraph"[ \t] {
1965 if (yyextra->sectionLevel>3)
1966 {
1967 unput('\\');
1968 BEGIN(Comment);
1969 }
1970 }
1971<SkipInternal>[@\\]"endinternal"[ \t]* {
1972 BEGIN(Comment);
1973 }
1974<SkipInternal>[^ \\@\n]+ { // skip non-special characters
1975 }
1976<SkipInternal>. { // any other character
1977 }
1978
1979
1980 /* ----- handle argument of name command ------- */
1981
1982<NameParam>{DOCNL} { // end of argument
1983 //if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
1984 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1985 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
1986 BEGIN( Comment );
1987 }
1988<NameParam>{LC} { // line continuation
1989 yyextra->lineNr++;
1990 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
1991 yyextra->docGroup.appendHeader(' ');
1992 }
1993<NameParam>. { // ignore other stuff
1994 yyextra->docGroup.appendHeader(*yytext);
1995 yyextra->current->name+=*yytext;
1996 }
1997
1998 /* ----- handle argument of noop command ------- */
1999<Noop>{DOCNL} { // end of argument
2000 if (*yytext=='\n')
2001 {
2002 yyextra->lineNr++;
2003 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2004 }
2005 BEGIN( Comment );
2006 }
2007<Noop>. { // ignore other stuff
2008 }
2009 /* ----- handle argument of raisewarning command ------- */
2010<RaiseWarning>{DOCNL} { // end of argument
2011 warn_doc_error(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2012 "%s",qPrint(yyextra->raiseWarning));
2013 yyextra->raiseWarning = "";
2014 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2015 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2016 BEGIN( Comment );
2017 }
warn_doc_error
#define warn_doc_error(file, line, fmt,...)
Definition message.h:74
2018<RaiseWarning>. { // ignore other stuff
2019 yyextra->raiseWarning += yytext;
2020 }
2021 /* ----- handle argument of ingroup command ------- */
2022
2023<InGroupParam>{LABELID} { // group id
2024 yyextra->current->groups.push_back(
2025 Grouping(QCString(yytext), Grouping::GROUPING_INGROUP)
2026 );
2027 yyextra->inGroupParamFound=TRUE;
2028 }
Grouping
Grouping info.
Definition types.h:65
Grouping::GROUPING_INGROUP
@ GROUPING_INGROUP
membership in group was defined by @ingroup
Definition types.h:74
2029<InGroupParam>{DOCNL} { // missing argument
2030 if (!yyextra->inGroupParamFound)
2031 {
2032 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2033 "Missing group name for \\ingroup command"
2034 );
2035 }
2036 //if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2037 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2038 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
2039 BEGIN( Comment );
2040 }
2041<InGroupParam>{LC} { // line continuation
2042 yyextra->lineNr++;
2043 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2044 }
2045<InGroupParam>. { // ignore other stuff
2046 addOutput(yyscanner,*yytext);
2047 }
2048
2049 /* ----- handle argument of fn command ------- */
2050
2051<FnParam>{DOCNL} { // end of argument
2052 if (yyextra->braceCount==0)
2053 {
2054 //if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2055 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2056 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
2057 yyextra->langParser->parsePrototype(yyextra->functionProto);
2058 BEGIN( Comment );
2059 }
2060 }
2061<FnParam>{LC} { // line continuation
2062 yyextra->lineNr++;
2063 yyextra->functionProto+=' ';
2064 }
2065<FnParam>[^@\\\n()]+ { // non-special characters
2066 yyextra->functionProto+=yytext;
2067 }
2068<FnParam>"(" {
2069 yyextra->functionProto+=yytext;
2070 yyextra->braceCount++;
2071 }
2072<FnParam>")" {
2073 yyextra->functionProto+=yytext;
2074 yyextra->braceCount--;
2075 }
2076<FnParam>. { // add other stuff
2077 yyextra->functionProto+=*yytext;
2078 }
2079
2080
2081 /* ----- handle argument of overload command ------- */
2082
2083
2084<OverloadParam>{DOCNL} { // end of argument
2085 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2086 if (yyextra->functionProto.stripWhiteSpace().isEmpty())
2087 { // plain overload command
2088 addOutput(yyscanner,getOverloadDocs());
2089 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2090 }
2091 else // overload declaration
2092 {
2093 makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::OVERLOADDOC_SEC);
2094 yyextra->langParser->parsePrototype(yyextra->functionProto);
2095 }
2096 BEGIN( Comment );
2097 }
Entry::OVERLOADDOC_SEC
@ OVERLOADDOC_SEC
Definition entry.h:100
getOverloadDocs
QCString getOverloadDocs()
Definition util.cpp:4211
2098<OverloadParam>{LC} { // line continuation
2099 yyextra->lineNr++;
2100 yyextra->functionProto+=' ';
2101 }
2102<OverloadParam>. { // add other stuff
2103 yyextra->functionProto+=*yytext;
2104 }
2105
2106 /* ----- handle argument of inherit command ------- */
2107
2108<InheritParam>({ID}("::"|"."))*{ID} { // found argument
2109 yyextra->current->extends.push_back(
2110 BaseInfo(removeRedundantWhiteSpace(QCString(yytext)),Protection::Public,Specifier::Normal)
2111 );
2112 BEGIN( Comment );
2113 }
2114<InheritParam>{DOCNL} { // missing argument
2115 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2116 "\\inherit command has no argument"
2117 );
2118 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2119 addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2120 BEGIN( Comment );
2121 }
2122<InheritParam>. { // invalid character for anchor label
2123 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2124 "Invalid or missing name for \\inherit command"
2125 );
2126 BEGIN(Comment);
2127 }
2128
2129 /* ----- handle argument of extends and implements commands ------- */
2130
2131<ExtendsParam>({ID}("::"|"."))*{ID} { // found argument
2132 yyextra->current->extends.push_back(
2133 BaseInfo(removeRedundantWhiteSpace(QCString(yytext)),Protection::Public,Specifier::Normal)
2134 );
2135 BEGIN( Comment );
2136 }
2137<ExtendsParam>{DOCNL} { // missing argument
2138 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2139 "'\\%s' command has no argument",qPrint(yyextra->currentCmd)
2140 );
2141 //if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2142 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2143 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
2144 BEGIN( Comment );
2145 }
2146<ExtendsParam>. { // ignore other stuff
2147 }
2148
2149 /* ----- handle language specific sections ------- */
2150
2151<SkipLang>[\\@]"~"[a-zA-Z-]* { /* language switch */
2152 QCString langId(&yytext[2]);
2153 if (!langId.isEmpty() && !Config_isAvailableEnum(OUTPUT_LANGUAGE,langId))
2154 {
2155 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2156 "non supported language '%s' specified in '%s'",langId.data(),QCString(yytext).stripWhiteSpace().data());
2157 }
2158 else if (langId.isEmpty() ||
2159 qstricmp(Config_getEnumAsString(OUTPUT_LANGUAGE),langId)==0)
2160 { // enable language specific section
2161 BEGIN(Comment);
2162 }
2163 }
2164<SkipLang>[^*@\\\n]* { /* any character not a *, @, backslash or new line */
2165 }
2166<SkipLang>{DOCNL} { /* new line in verbatim block */
2167 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2168 }
2169<SkipLang>. { /* any other character */
2170 }
2171
2172 /* ----- handle arguments of the cite command ------- */
2173
2174<CiteLabel>{CITEID} { // found argument
2175 addCite(yyscanner);
2176 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
2177 BEGIN(Comment);
2178 }
2179<CiteLabel>{DOCNL} { // missing argument
2180 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2181 "\\cite command has no label"
2182 );
2183 //if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2184 //addOutput(yyscanner,'\n');
2185 unput_string(yytext,yyleng);
2186 BEGIN( Comment );
2187 }
2188<CiteLabel>. { // invalid character for cite label
2189 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2190 "Invalid or missing cite label"
2191 );
2192 BEGIN(Comment);
2193 }
2194
2195 /* ----- handle argument of the copydoc command ------- */
2196
2197<CopyDoc><<EOF>> {
2198 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
2199 addOutput(yyscanner," \\ilinebr\\ilinebr\\copydetails ");
2200 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->copyDocArg);
2201 addOutput(yyscanner,"\n");
2202 BEGIN(Comment);
2203 }
2204<CopyDoc>{DOCNL} {
2205 if (*yytext=='\n') yyextra->lineNr++;
2206 if (yyextra->braceCount==0)
2207 {
2208 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
2209 addOutput(yyscanner," \\ilinebr\\ilinebr\\copydetails ");
2210 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->copyDocArg);
2211 addOutput(yyscanner,"\n");
2212 BEGIN(Comment);
2213 }
2214 }
2215<CopyDoc>{LC} { // line continuation
2216 yyextra->lineNr++;
2217 }
2218<CopyDoc>[^@\\\n()]+ { // non-special characters
2219 yyextra->copyDocArg+=yytext;
2220 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
2221 }
2222<CopyDoc>"(" {
2223 yyextra->copyDocArg+=yytext;
2224 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
2225 yyextra->braceCount++;
2226 }
2227<CopyDoc>")" {
2228 yyextra->copyDocArg+=yytext;
2229 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
2230 yyextra->braceCount--;
2231 }
2232<CopyDoc>. {
2233 yyextra->copyDocArg+=yytext;
2234 addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
2235 }
2236
2237 /*
2238<*>. { fprintf(stderr,"Lex scanner %s %sdefault rule for state %s: #%s#\n", __FILE__,!yyextra->fileName.isEmpty() ? ("(" + yyextra->fileName +") ").data(): "",stateToString(YY_START),yytext);}
2239<*>\n { fprintf(stderr,"Lex scanner %s %sdefault rule newline for state %s.\n", __FILE__, !yyextra->fileName.isEmpty() ? ("(" + yyextra->fileName +") ").data(): "",stateToString(YY_START));}
2240 */
2241
2242%%
2243
2244//----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2245
2246static bool handleBrief(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2247{
2248 //printf("handleBrief\n");
2249 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputBrief);
2250 return FALSE;
2251}
2252
2253static bool handleFn(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2254{
2255 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2256 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::MEMBERDOC_SEC);
2257 yyextra->functionProto.resize(0);
2258 yyextra->braceCount=0;
2259 BEGIN(FnParam);
2260 return stop;
2261}
2262
2263static bool handleDef(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2264{
2265 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2266 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::DEFINEDOC_SEC);
2267 yyextra->functionProto.resize(0);
2268 BEGIN(FnParam);
2269 return stop;
2270}
2271
2272static bool handleOverload(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2273{
2274 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2275 yyextra->functionProto.resize(0);
2276 BEGIN(OverloadParam);
2277 return FALSE;
2278}
2279
2280static bool handleEnum(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2281{
2282 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2283 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::ENUMDOC_SEC);
2284 BEGIN(EnumDocArg1);
2285 return stop;
2286}
2287
2288static bool handleDefGroup(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2289{

2291 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::GROUPDOC_SEC);
2292 yyextra->current->groupDocType = Entry::GROUPDOC_NORMAL;
2293 BEGIN( GroupDocArg1 );
2294 return stop;
2295}
2296
2297static bool handleAddToGroup(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2298{
2299 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2300 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::GROUPDOC_SEC);
2301 yyextra->current->groupDocType = Entry::GROUPDOC_ADD;
2302 BEGIN( GroupDocArg1 );
2303 return stop;
2304}
2305
2306static bool handleWeakGroup(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2307{
2308 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2309 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::GROUPDOC_SEC);
2310 yyextra->current->groupDocType = Entry::GROUPDOC_WEAK;
2311 BEGIN( GroupDocArg1 );
2312 return stop;
2313}
2314
2315static bool handleNamespace(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2316{
2317 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2318 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::NAMESPACEDOC_SEC);
2319 BEGIN( NameSpaceDocArg1 );
2320 return stop;
2321}
2322
2323static bool handlePackage(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2324{
2325 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2326 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::PACKAGEDOC_SEC);
2327 BEGIN( PackageDocArg1 );
2328 return stop;
2329}
2330
2331static bool handleClass(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2332{
2333 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2334 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::CLASSDOC_SEC);
2335 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2336 BEGIN( ClassDocArg1 );
2337 return stop;
2338}
2339
2340static bool handleConcept(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2341{
2342 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2343 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::CONCEPTDOC_SEC);
2344 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2345 BEGIN( ConceptDocArg1 );
2346 return stop;
2347}
2348
2349static bool handleHeaderFile(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2350{
2351 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2352 BEGIN( ClassDocArg2 );
2353 return FALSE;
2354}
2355
2356static bool handleProtocol(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2357{ // Obj-C protocol

2359 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::PROTOCOLDOC_SEC);
2360 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2361 BEGIN( ClassDocArg1 );
2362 return stop;
2363}
2364
2365static bool handleCategory(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2366{ // Obj-C category

2368 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::CATEGORYDOC_SEC);
2369 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2370 BEGIN( CategoryDocArg1 );
2371 return stop;
2372}
2373
2374static bool handleUnion(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2375{
2376 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2377 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::UNIONDOC_SEC);
2378 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2379 BEGIN( ClassDocArg1 );
2380 return stop;
2381}
2382
2383static bool handleStruct(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2384{
2385 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;

2392static bool handleInterface(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2393{
