2399}
2400
2401static bool handleIdlException(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2402{
2403 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2404 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::EXCEPTIONDOC_SEC);
2405 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2406 BEGIN( ClassDocArg1 );
2407 return stop;
2408}
2409
2410static bool handlePage(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2411{
2412 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2413 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::PAGEDOC_SEC);
2414 BEGIN( PageDocArg1 );
2415 return stop;
2416}
2417
2418static bool handleMainpage(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2419{
2420 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2421 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::MAINPAGEDOC_SEC);
2422 if (!stop)
2423 {
2424 yyextra->current->name = "mainpage";
2425 }
2426 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
2427 BEGIN( PageDocArg2 );
2428 return stop;
2429}
2430
2431static bool handleFile(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2432{
2433 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2434 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::FILEDOC_SEC);
2435 if (!stop)
2436 {
2437 yyextra->current->name = yyextra->fileName;
2438 }
2439 BEGIN( FileDocArg1 );
2440 return stop;
2441}
2442
2443static bool handleParam(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2444{
2445 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2446 // we need process param and retval arguments to escape leading underscores in case of
2447 // markdown processing, see bug775493
2448 addOutput(yyscanner,"@param ");
2449 BEGIN( ParamArg1 );
2450 return FALSE;
2451}
2452
2453static bool handleRetval(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2454{
2455 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2456 addOutput(yyscanner,"@retval ");
2457 BEGIN( ParamArg1 );
2458 return FALSE;
2459}
2460
2461static bool handleDir(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2462{
2463 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2464 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::DIRDOC_SEC);
2465 if (!stop) yyextra->current->name = yyextra->fileName;
2466 BEGIN( FileDocArg1 );
2467 return stop;
2468}
2469
2470static bool handleExample(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &optList)
2471{
2472 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2473 Entry::Sections section=Entry::EXAMPLE_SEC;
2474 for (const auto &opt : optList)
2475 {
2476 if (opt=="lineno")
2477 {
2478 section=Entry::EXAMPLE_LINENO_SEC;
2479 }
2480 else
2481 {
2482 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2483 "unsupported option '%s' for command '\\%s'",opt.c_str(),qPrint(cmd));
2484 }
2485 }
2486 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,section);
2487 if (!stop) yyextra->current->name = yyextra->fileName;
2488 BEGIN( FileDocArg1 );
2489 return stop;
2490}
2491
2492static bool handleDetails(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2493{
2494 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2495 if (yyextra->inContext!=OutputBrief)
2496 {
2497 addOutput(yyscanner,"\\ilinebr\\ilinebr "); // treat @details outside brief description
2498 // as a new paragraph
2499 }
2500 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
2501 return FALSE;
2502}
2503
2504static bool handleRaiseWarning(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2505{
2506 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2507 yyextra->raiseWarning = "";
2508 BEGIN( RaiseWarning );
2509 return FALSE;
2510}
2511
2512static bool handleNoop(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2513{
2514 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2515 BEGIN( Noop );
2516 return FALSE;
2517}
2518
2519static bool handleName(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2520{
2521 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2522 bool stop=makeStructuralIndicator(yyscanner,Entry::MEMBERGRP_SEC);
2523 if (!stop)
2524 {
2525 yyextra->docGroup.clearHeader();
2526 BEGIN( NameParam );
2527 if (!yyextra->docGroup.isEmpty()) // end of previous member group
2528 {
2529 yyextra->docGroup.close(yyextra->current,yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,TRUE,true);
2530 }
2531 }
2532 return stop;
2533}
2534
2535static bool handleTodo(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2536{
2537 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2538 yyextra->newXRefKind = XRef_Todo;
2539 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputXRef);
2540 yyextra->xrefKind = XRef_Todo;
2541 return FALSE;
2542}
2543
2544static bool handleTest(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2545{
2546 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2547 yyextra->newXRefKind = XRef_Test;
2548 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputXRef);
2549 yyextra->xrefKind = XRef_Test;
2550 return FALSE;
2551}
2552
2553static bool handleBug(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2554{
2555 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2556 yyextra->newXRefKind = XRef_Bug;
2557 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputXRef);
2558 yyextra->xrefKind = XRef_Bug;
2559 return FALSE;
2560}
2561
2562static bool handleDeprecated(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2563{
2564 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2565 yyextra->newXRefKind = XRef_Deprecated;
2566 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputXRef);
2567 yyextra->xrefKind = XRef_Deprecated;
2568 return FALSE;
2569}
2570
2571static bool handleXRefItem(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2572{
2573 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2574 yyextra->newXRefKind = XRef_Item;
2575 BEGIN(XRefItemParam1);
2576 return FALSE;
2577}
2578
2579static bool handleParBlock(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2580{
2581 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2582 if (yyextra->insideParBlock)
2583 {
2584 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2585 "found \\parblock command while already in a parblock!");
2586 }
2587 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
2588 {
2589 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
2590 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
2591 }
2592 addOutput(yyscanner,"@parblock ");
2593 yyextra->insideParBlock = TRUE;
2594 return FALSE;
2595}
2596
2597static bool handleEndParBlock(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2598{
2599 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2600 if (!yyextra->insideParBlock)
2601 {
2602 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2603 "found \\endparblock command without matching \\parblock!");
2604 }
2605 addOutput(yyscanner,"@endparblock");
2606 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc); // to end a parblock inside a xrefitem like context
2607 yyextra->insideParBlock = FALSE;
2608 return FALSE;
2609}
2610
2611static bool handleRelated(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2612{
2613 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2614 if (!yyextra->current->relates.isEmpty())
2615 {
2616 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2617 "found multiple \\relates, \\relatesalso or \\memberof commands in a comment block, using last definition");
2618 }
2619 yyextra->current->relatesType = RelatesType::Simple;
2620 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2621 BEGIN(RelatesParam1);
2622 return FALSE;
2623}
2624
2625static bool handleRelatedAlso(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2626{
2627 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2628 if (!yyextra->current->relates.isEmpty())
2629 {
2630 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2631 "found multiple \\relates, \\relatesalso or \\memberof commands in a comment block, using last definition");
2632 }
2633 yyextra->current->relatesType = RelatesType::Duplicate;
2634 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2635 BEGIN(RelatesParam1);
2636 return FALSE;
2637}
2638
2639static bool handleMemberOf(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
2640{
2641 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2642 if (!yyextra->current->relates.isEmpty())
2643 {
2644 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2645 "found multiple \\relates, \\relatesalso or \\memberof commands in a comment block, using last definition");
2646 }
2647 yyextra->current->relatesType = RelatesType::MemberOf;
2648 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
2649 BEGIN(RelatesParam1);
2650 return FALSE;
2651}
2652
2653static bool handleRefItem(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2654{
2655 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2656 addOutput(yyscanner,"@refitem ");
2657 BEGIN(LineParam);
2658 return FALSE;
2659}
2660
2661static bool handleSection(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &s, const StringVector &)
2662{
2663 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2664 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
2665 addOutput(yyscanner,"@"+s+" ");
2666 BEGIN(SectionLabel);
2667 if (s=="section") yyextra->sectionLevel=1;
2668 else if (s=="subsection") yyextra->sectionLevel=2;
2669 else if (s=="subsubsection") yyextra->sectionLevel=3;
2670 else if (s=="paragraph") yyextra->sectionLevel=4;
2671 return FALSE;
2672}
2673
2674static bool handleSubpage(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &s, const StringVector &)
2675{
2676 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2677 if (yyextra->current->section!=Entry::EMPTY_SEC &&
2678 yyextra->current->section!=Entry::PAGEDOC_SEC &&
2679 yyextra->current->section!=Entry::MAINPAGEDOC_SEC
2680 )
2681 {
2682 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2683 "found \\subpage command in a comment block that is not marked as a page!");
2684 }
2685 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
2686 {
2687 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
2688 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
2689 }
2690 addOutput(yyscanner,"@"+s+" ");
2691 BEGIN(SubpageLabel);
2692 return FALSE;
2693}
2694
2695static bool handleAnchor(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &s, const StringVector &optList)
2696{
2697 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2698 addOutput(yyscanner,"@"+s+" ");
2699 if (optList.empty())
2700 {
2701 yyextra -> anchorTitle = "";
2702 }
2703 else
2704 {
2705 yyextra -> anchorTitle = join(optList," ");
2706 }
2707 BEGIN(AnchorLabel);
2708 return FALSE;
2709}
2710
2711static bool handleImage(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &s, const StringVector &optList)
2712{
2713 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2714 for (const auto &opt : optList)
2715 {
2716 QCString locOpt(opt);
2717 locOpt = locOpt.stripWhiteSpace();
2718 if (locOpt.lower().startsWith("anchor:"))
2719 {
2720 addAnchor(yyscanner,locOpt.mid(7));
2721 break; // real option handling will be done later on
2722 }
2723 }
2724 if (optList.empty())
2725 {
2726 addOutput(yyscanner,"@"+s+" ");
2727 }
2728 else
2729 {
2730 addOutput(yyscanner,"@"+s+"{"+QCString(join(optList,","))+"} ");
2731 }
2732 BEGIN(Comment);
2733 return FALSE;
2734}
2735
2736static bool handleCite(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &s, const StringVector &)
2737{
2738 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2739 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
2740 {
2741 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
2742 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
2743 }
2744 addOutput(yyscanner,"@"+s+" ");
2745 BEGIN(CiteLabel);
2746 return FALSE;
2747}
2748
2749static bool handleFormatBlock(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &s, const StringVector &optList)
2750{
2751 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2752 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
2753 {
2754 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
2755 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
2756 }
2757 if (optList.empty())
2758 {
2759 addOutput(yyscanner,"@"+s+" ");
2760 }
2761 else
2762 {
2763 addOutput(yyscanner,"@"+s+"{"+QCString(join(optList,","))+"} ");
2764 }
2765 //printf("handleFormatBlock(%s) with option(%s)\n",qPrint(s),qPrint(opt));
2766 yyextra->blockName=s;
2767 yyextra->commentCount=0;
2768 BEGIN(FormatBlock);
2769 return FALSE;
2770}
2771
2772static bool handleAddIndex(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2773{
2774 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2775 addOutput(yyscanner,"@addindex ");
2776 BEGIN(LineParam);
2777 return FALSE;
2778}
2779
2780static bool handleFileInfo(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &optList)
2781{
2782 using OutputWriter = std::function<void(yyscan_t,FileInfo &)>;
2783 static std::unordered_map<std::string,OutputWriter> options =
2784 { // name, writer
2785 { "name", [](yyscan_t s,FileInfo &fi) { addOutput(s,fi.baseName()); } },
2786 { "extension", [](yyscan_t s,FileInfo &fi) { addOutput(s,fi.extension(true)); } },
2787 { "filename", [](yyscan_t s,FileInfo &fi) { addOutput(s,fi.fileName()); } },
2788 { "directory", [](yyscan_t s,FileInfo &fi) { addOutput(s,fi.dirPath()); } },
2789 { "full", [](yyscan_t s,FileInfo &fi) { addOutput(s,fi.absFilePath()); } },
2790 };
2791
2792 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2793 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
2794 {
2795 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
2796 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
2797 }
2798 bool first = true;
2799 FileInfo fi(yyextra->fileName.str());
2800 for (const auto &opt_ : optList)
2801 {
2802 QCString optStripped = QCString(opt_).stripWhiteSpace();
2803 std::string opt = optStripped.lower().str();
2804 auto it = options.find(opt);
2805 if (it != options.end())
2806 {
2807 if (!first)
2808 {
2809 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"Multiple options specified with \\fileinfo, discarding '%s'", qPrint(optStripped));
2810 }
2811 else
2812 {
2813 it->second(yyscanner,fi);
2814 }
2815 first = false;
2816 }
2817 else
2818 {
2819 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"Unknown option specified with \\fileinfo: '%s'", qPrint(optStripped));
2820 }
2821 }
2822 if (first) // no options specified
2823 {
2824 if (Config_getBool(FULL_PATH_NAMES))
2825 {
2826 addOutput(yyscanner,stripFromPath(yyextra->fileName));
2827 }
2828 else
2829 {
2830 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->fileName);
2831 }
2832 }
2833 addOutput(yyscanner," ");
2834 return FALSE;
2835}
2836
2837static bool handleLineInfo(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2838{
2839 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2840 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
2841 {
2842 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
2843 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
2844 }
2845 addOutput(yyscanner,QCString().setNum(yyextra->lineNr));
2846 addOutput(yyscanner," ");
2847 return FALSE;
2848}
2849
2850static bool handleIf(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2851{
2852 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2853 yyextra->guardType = Guard_If;
2854 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf = yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd;
2855 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
2856 {
2857 yyextra->guards.push(GuardedSection(true));
2858 }
2859 else
2860 {
2861 bool enabled = yyextra->guards.top().isEnabled();
2862 yyextra->guards.push(GuardedSection(enabled));
2863 }
2864 BEGIN(GuardParam);
2865 return FALSE;
2866}
2867
2868static bool handleIfNot(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2869{
2870 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2871 yyextra->guardType = Guard_IfNot;
2872 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf = yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd;
2873 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
2874 {
2875 yyextra->guards.push(GuardedSection(true));
2876 }
2877 else
2878 {
2879 bool enabled = yyextra->guards.top().isEnabled();
2880 yyextra->guards.push(GuardedSection(enabled));
2881 }
2882 BEGIN(GuardParam);
2883 return FALSE;
2884}
2885
2886static bool handleElseIf(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2887{
2888 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2889 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
2890 {
2891 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2892 "found \\elseif without matching start command");
2893 }
2894 else if (yyextra->guards.top().hasElse())
2895 {
2896 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2897 "found \\elseif command after \\else command was given in \\if construct");
2898 yyextra->guardType = Guard_ElseIf;
2899 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf = yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd;
2900 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
2901 BEGIN(GuardParam);
2902 }
2903 else
2904 {
2905 yyextra->guardType = Guard_ElseIf;
2906 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf = yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd;
2907 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
2908 BEGIN(GuardParam);
2909 }
2910 return FALSE;
2911}
2912
2913static bool handleElse(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2914{
2915 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2916 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
2917 {
2918 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2919 "found \\else without matching start command");
2920 }
2921 else if (yyextra->guards.top().hasElse())
2922 {
2923 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2924 "found multiple \\else commands in same \\if construct");
2925 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
2926 yyextra->guards.top().setElse();
2927 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
2928 }
2929 else
2930 {
2931 yyextra->guards.top().setElse();
2932 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf = yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd;
2933 if (yyextra->guards.top().isEnabledFound())
2934 {
2935 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
2936 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
2937 }
2938 else
2939 {
2940 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(true);
2941 BEGIN( GuardParamEnd );
2942 }
2943 }
2944 return FALSE;
2945}
2946
2947static bool handleEndIf(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2948{
2949 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2950 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
2951 {
2952 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
2953 "found \\endif without matching start command");
2954 }
2955 else
2956 {
2957 yyextra->guards.pop();
2958 }
2959 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
2960 {
2961 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
2962 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
2963 }
2964 if (yyextra->guards.empty())
2965 {
2966 BEGIN( GuardParamEnd );
2967 }
2968 else
2969 {
2970 if (yyextra->guards.top().isEnabled())
2971 {
2972 BEGIN( GuardParamEnd );
2973 }
2974 else
2975 {
2976 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
2977 }
2978 }
2979 return FALSE;
2980}
2981
2982static bool handleIngroup(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2983{
2984 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2985 yyextra->inGroupParamFound=FALSE;
2986 BEGIN( InGroupParam );
2987 return FALSE;
2988}
2989
2990static bool handleNoSubGrouping(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2991{
2992 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
2993 yyextra->current->subGrouping = FALSE;
2994 return FALSE;
2995}
2996
2997static bool handleShowInitializer(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
2998{
2999 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3000 yyextra->current->initLines = 100000; // ON
3001 return FALSE;
3002}
3003
3004static bool handleHideInitializer(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3005{
3006 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3007 yyextra->current->initLines = 0; // OFF
3008 return FALSE;
3009}
3010
3011static bool handleCallgraph(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3012{
3013 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3014 yyextra->current->callGraph = TRUE; // ON
3015 return FALSE;
3016}
3017
3018static bool handleHideCallgraph(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3019{
3020 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3021 yyextra->current->callGraph = FALSE; // OFF
3022 return FALSE;
3023}
3024
3025static bool handleCallergraph(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3026{
3027 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3028 yyextra->current->callerGraph = TRUE; // ON
3029 return FALSE;
3030}
3031
3032static bool handleHideCallergraph(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3033{
3034 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3035 yyextra->current->callerGraph = FALSE; // OFF
3036 return FALSE;
3037}
3038
3039static bool handleQualifier(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
3040{
3041 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3042 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
3043 BEGIN(Qualifier);
3044 return FALSE;
3045}
3046
3047static bool handleReferencedByRelation(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3048{
3049 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3050 yyextra->current->referencedByRelation = TRUE; // ON
3051 return FALSE;
3052}
3053
3054static bool handleHideReferencedByRelation(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3055{
3056 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3057 yyextra->current->referencedByRelation = FALSE; // OFF
3058 return FALSE;
3059}
3060
3061static bool handleReferencesRelation(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3062{
3063 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3064 yyextra->current->referencesRelation = TRUE; // ON
3065 return FALSE;
3066}
3067
3068static bool handleHideReferencesRelation(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3069{
3070 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3071 yyextra->current->referencesRelation = FALSE; // OFF
3072 return FALSE;
3073}
3074
3075static bool handleInternal(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3076{
3077 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3078 if (!Config_getBool(INTERNAL_DOCS))
3079 {
3080 // make sure some whitespace before a \internal command
3081 // is not treated as "documentation"
3082 if (yyextra->current->doc.stripWhiteSpace().isEmpty())
3083 {
3084 yyextra->current->doc.resize(0);
3085 }
3086 yyextra->condCount=0;
3087 BEGIN( SkipInternal );
3088 }
3089 else
3090 {
3091 // re-enabled for bug640828
3092 addOutput(yyscanner," \\internal ");
3093 yyextra->inInternalDocs = TRUE;
3094 }
3095 return FALSE;
3096}
3097
3098static bool handleStatic(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3099{
3100 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3101 yyextra->current->isStatic = TRUE;
3102 return FALSE;
3103}
3104
3105static bool handlePure(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3106{
3107 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3108 yyextra->current->virt = Specifier::Pure;
3109 return FALSE;
3110}
3111
3112static bool handlePrivate(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3113{
3114 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3115 yyextra->current->protection = Protection::Private;
3116 return FALSE;
3117}
3118
3119static bool handlePrivateSection(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3120{
3121 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3122 yyextra->current->protection = yyextra->protection = Protection::Private;
3123 return FALSE;
3124}
3125
3126static bool handleProtected(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3127{
3128 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3129 yyextra->current->protection = Protection::Protected;
3130 return FALSE;
3131}
3132
3133static bool handleProtectedSection(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3134{
3135 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3136 yyextra->current->protection = yyextra->protection = Protection::Protected ;
3137 return FALSE;
3138}
3139
3140static bool handlePublic(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3141{
3142 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3143 yyextra->current->protection = Protection::Public;
3144 return FALSE;
3145}
3146
3147static bool handlePublicSection(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3148{
3149 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3150 yyextra->current->protection = yyextra->protection = Protection::Public;
3151 return FALSE;
3152}
3153
3154static bool handleToc(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &optList)
3155{
3156 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3157 if (yyextra->current->section==Entry::PAGEDOC_SEC ||
3158 yyextra->current->section==Entry::MAINPAGEDOC_SEC)
3159 {
3160 for (const auto &opt_ : optList)
3161 {
3162 QCString opt = QCString(opt_).stripWhiteSpace().lower();
3163 char dum;
3164 int level = 5;
3165 int i = opt.find(':');
3166 if (i>0) // found ':' but not on position 0 what would mean just a level
3167 {
3168 if (sscanf(opt.right(opt.length() - i - 1).data(),"%d%c",&level,&dum) != 1)
3169 {
3170 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"Unknown option:level specified with \\tableofcontents: '%s'", qPrint(QCString(opt_).stripWhiteSpace()));
3171 opt = "";
3172 }
3173 else
3174 {
3175 level = (level > 5 ? 5 : level);
3176 level = (level <= 0 ? 5 : level);
3177 opt = opt.left(i).stripWhiteSpace();
3178 }
3179 }
3180 if (!opt.isEmpty())
3181 {
3182 if (opt == "html")
3183 {
3184 yyextra->current->localToc.enableHtml(level);
3185 }
3186 else if (opt == "latex")
3187 {
3188 yyextra->current->localToc.enableLatex(level);
3189 }
3190 else if (opt == "xml")
3191 {
3192 yyextra->current->localToc.enableXml(level);
3193 }
3194 else if (opt == "docbook")
3195 {
3196 yyextra->current->localToc.enableDocbook(level);
3197 }
3198 else
3199 {
3200 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"Unknown option specified with \\tableofcontents: '%s'", qPrint(QCString(opt_).stripWhiteSpace()));
3201 }
3202 }
3203 }
3204 if (yyextra->current->localToc.nothingEnabled())
3205 {
3206 // for backward compatibility
3207 yyextra->current->localToc.enableHtml(5);
3208 yyextra->current->localToc.enableXml(5);
3209 }
3210 }
3211 return FALSE;
3212}
3213
3214static bool handleInherit(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3215{
3216 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3217 BEGIN(InheritParam);
3218 return FALSE;
3219}
3220
3221static bool handleExtends(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &cmd, const StringVector &)
3222{
3223 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3224 yyextra->currentCmd = cmd;
3225 BEGIN(ExtendsParam);
3226 return FALSE;
3227}
3228
3229static bool handleCopyBrief(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3230{
3231 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3232 if (yyextra->current->brief.isEmpty() && yyextra->current->doc.isEmpty())
3233 { // if we don't have a brief or detailed description yet,
3234 // then the @copybrief should end up in the brief description.
3235 // otherwise it will be copied inline (see bug691315 & bug700788)
3236 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputBrief);
3237 }
3238 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
3239 {
3240 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
3241 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
3242 }
3243 addOutput(yyscanner,"\\copybrief ");
3244 return FALSE;
3245}
3246
3247static bool handleCopyDetails(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3248{
3249 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3250 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
3251 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
3252 {
3253 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
3254 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
3255 }
3256 addOutput(yyscanner,"\\copydetails ");
3257 return FALSE;
3258}
3259
3260static bool handleCopyDoc(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &, const StringVector &)
3261{
3262 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3263 if (yyextra->current->brief.isEmpty() && yyextra->current->doc.isEmpty())
3264 { // if we don't have a brief or detailed description yet,
3265 // then the @copybrief should end up in the brief description.
3266 // otherwise it will be copied inline (see bug691315 & bug700788)
3267 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputBrief);
3268 }
3269 if (!yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.isEmpty())
3270 {
3271 addOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd);
3272 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
3273 }
3274 addOutput(yyscanner,"\\copybrief ");
3275 yyextra->copyDocArg.resize(0);
3276 yyextra->braceCount = 0;
3277 BEGIN(CopyDoc);
3278 return FALSE;
3279}
3280
3281//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3282
3283static void initParser(yyscan_t yyscanner)
3284{
3285 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3286 yyextra->sectionLabel.resize(0);
3287 yyextra->sectionTitle.resize(0);
3288 yyextra->docGroup.clearHeader();
3289 yyextra->insideParBlock = FALSE;
3290}
3291
3292
3293static bool getDocSectionName(int s)
3294{
3295 switch(s)
3296 {
3297 case Entry::CLASSDOC_SEC:
3298 case Entry::STRUCTDOC_SEC:
3299 case Entry::UNIONDOC_SEC:
3300 case Entry::EXCEPTIONDOC_SEC:
3301 case Entry::NAMESPACEDOC_SEC:
3302 case Entry::PROTOCOLDOC_SEC:
3303 case Entry::CATEGORYDOC_SEC:
3304 case Entry::ENUMDOC_SEC:
3305 case Entry::PAGEDOC_SEC:
3306 case Entry::VARIABLEDOC_SEC:
3307 case Entry::MEMBERDOC_SEC:
3308 case Entry::OVERLOADDOC_SEC:
3309 case Entry::FILEDOC_SEC:
3310 case Entry::DEFINEDOC_SEC:
3311 case Entry::GROUPDOC_SEC:
3312 case Entry::MAINPAGEDOC_SEC:
3313 case Entry::PACKAGEDOC_SEC:
3314 case Entry::DIRDOC_SEC:
3315 case Entry::EXAMPLE_SEC:
3316 case Entry::MEMBERGRP_SEC:
3317 case Entry::CONCEPTDOC_SEC:
3318 return TRUE;
3319 default:
3320 return FALSE;
3321 }
3322}
3323
3324//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3325
3326static bool makeStructuralIndicator(yyscan_t yyscanner,Entry::Sections s)
3327{
3328 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3329 //printf("yyextra->current->section=%x\n",yyextra->current->section);
3330 if (getDocSectionName(yyextra->current->section))
3331 {
3332 return TRUE;
3333 }
3334 else
3335 {
3336 yyextra->needNewEntry = TRUE;
3337 yyextra->current->section = s;
3338 yyextra->current->fileName = yyextra->fileName;
3339 yyextra->current->startLine = yyextra->lineNr;
3340 yyextra->current->docLine = yyextra->lineNr;
3341 return FALSE;
3342 }
3343}
3344
3345//-----------------------------------------------------------------
3346
3347static void lineCount(yyscan_t yyscanner)
3348{
3349 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3350 for( const char* c = yytext ; *c ; ++c )
3351 yyextra->lineNr += (*c == '\n') ;
3352}
3353
3354//-----------------------------------------------------------------
3355
3356static QCString stripQuotes(const char *s)
3357{
3358 QCString name;
3359 if (s==0 || *s==0) return name;
3360 name=s;
3361 if (name.at(0)=='"' && name.at(name.length()-1)=='"')
3362 {
3363 name=name.mid(1,name.length()-2);
3364 }
3365 return name;
3366}
3367
3368//-----------------------------------------------------------------
3369
3370static void addXRefItem(yyscan_t yyscanner,
3371 const QCString &listName,const QCString &itemTitle,
3372 const QCString &listTitle,bool append)
3373{
3374 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3375 if (listName.isEmpty()) return;
3376 //printf("addXRefItem(%s,%s,%s,%d)\n",listName,itemTitle,listTitle,append);
3377
3378 std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(g_sectionMutex);
3379
3380 RefList *refList = RefListManager::instance().add(listName,listTitle,itemTitle);
3381 RefItem *item = 0;
3382 for (auto it = yyextra->current->sli.rbegin(); it != yyextra->current->sli.rend(); ++it)
3383 {
3384 RefItem *i = *it;
3385 if (i && i->list()->listName()==listName)
3386 {
3387 //printf("found %s lii->type=%s\n",listName,qPrint(i->list()->listName()));
3388 item = i;
3389 break;
3390 }
3391 }
3392 if (item && append) // already found item of same type just before this one
3393 {
3394 //printf("listName=%s item id = %d existing\n",listName,item->id());
3395 item->setText(item->text() + " <p>" + yyextra->outputXRef);
3396 //printf("%s: text +=%s\n",listName,qPrint(item->text));
3397 }
3398 else // new item
3399 {
3400
3401 // if we have already an item from the same list type (e.g. a second @todo)
3402 // in the same Entry (i.e. lii!=0) then we reuse its link anchor.
3403 item = refList->add();
3404 //printf("listName=%s item id = %d new yyextra->current=%p\n",listName,item->id(),yyextra->current);
3405 QCString anchorLabel;
3406 anchorLabel.sprintf("_%s%06d",listName.data(),item->id());
3407 item->setText(yyextra->outputXRef);
3408 item->setAnchor(anchorLabel);
3409 yyextra->current->sli.push_back(item);
3410 QCString cmdString;
3411 cmdString.sprintf(" \\xrefitem %s %d.",qPrint(listName),item->id());
3412 if (yyextra->inBody)
3413 {
3414 yyextra->current->inbodyDocs += cmdString;
3415 }
3416 else
3417 {
3418 yyextra->current->doc += cmdString;
3419 }
3420
3421 {
3422 SectionManager &sm = SectionManager::instance();
3423 const SectionInfo *si = sm.find(anchorLabel);
3424 if (si)
3425 {
3426 if (!si->ref().isEmpty()) // we are from a tag file
3427 {
3428 si = sm.replace(anchorLabel,listName,yyextra->lineNr,
3429 yyextra->sectionTitle,SectionType::Anchor,
3430 yyextra->sectionLevel);
3431 yyextra->current->anchors.push_back(si);
3432 }
3433 else if (si->lineNr() != -1)
3434 {
3435 warn(listName,yyextra->lineNr,"multiple use of section label '%s', (first occurrence: %s, line %d)",qPrint(anchorLabel),qPrint(si->fileName()),si->lineNr());
3436 }
3437 else
3438 {
3439 warn(listName,yyextra->lineNr,"multiple use of section label '%s', (first occurrence: %s)",qPrint(anchorLabel),qPrint(si->fileName()));
3440 }
3441 }
3442 else
3443 {
3444 si = sm.add(anchorLabel,listName,yyextra->lineNr,
3445 yyextra->sectionTitle,SectionType::Anchor,
3446 yyextra->sectionLevel);
3447 yyextra->current->anchors.push_back(si);
3448 }
3449 }
3450 }
3451 yyextra->outputXRef.resize(0);
3452}
3453
3454//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3455
3456// Adds a formula text to the list/dictionary of formulas if it was
3457// not already added. Returns the label of the formula.
3458static QCString addFormula(yyscan_t yyscanner)
3459{
3460 std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(g_formulaMutex);
3461 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3462 QCString formLabel;
3463 int id = FormulaManager::instance().addFormula(yyextra->formulaText.str());
3464 formLabel.sprintf("\\_form#%d",id);
3465 for (int i=0;i<yyextra->formulaNewLines;i++) formLabel+="@_fakenl"; // add fake newlines to
3466 // keep the warnings
3467 // correctly aligned.
3468 return formLabel;
3469}
3470
3471//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3472
3473static SectionType sectionLevelToType(int level)
3474{
3475 if (level>=0 && level<5) return (SectionType)level;
3476 return SectionType::Anchor;
3477}
3478
3479static void addSection(yyscan_t yyscanner)
3480{
3481 std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(g_sectionMutex);
3482 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3483 SectionManager &sm = SectionManager::instance();
3484 const SectionInfo *si = sm.find(yyextra->sectionLabel);
3485 if (si)
3486 {
3487 if (!si->ref().isEmpty()) // we are from a tag file
3488 {
3489 // create a new section element
3490 yyextra->sectionTitle+=yytext;
3491 yyextra->sectionTitle=yyextra->sectionTitle.stripWhiteSpace();
3492 si = sm.replace(yyextra->sectionLabel,yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
3493 yyextra->sectionTitle,sectionLevelToType(yyextra->sectionLevel),
3494 yyextra->sectionLevel);
3495
3496 // add section to this entry
3497 yyextra->current->anchors.push_back(si);
3498 }
3499 else if (si->lineNr() != -1)
3500 {
3501 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"multiple use of section label '%s' while adding section, (first occurrence: %s, line %d)",qPrint(yyextra->sectionLabel),qPrint(si->fileName()),si->lineNr());
3502 }
3503 else
3504 {
3505 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"multiple use of section label '%s' while adding section, (first occurrence: %s)",qPrint(yyextra->sectionLabel),qPrint(si->fileName()));
3506 }
3507 }
3508 else
3509 {
3510 // create a new section element
3511 yyextra->sectionTitle+=yytext;
3512 yyextra->sectionTitle=yyextra->sectionTitle.stripWhiteSpace();
3513 si = sm.add(yyextra->sectionLabel,yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
3514 yyextra->sectionTitle,sectionLevelToType(yyextra->sectionLevel),
3515 yyextra->sectionLevel);
3516
3517 // add section to this entry
3518 yyextra->current->anchors.push_back(si);
3519 }
3520}
3521
3522//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3523
3524static void addCite(yyscan_t yyscanner)
3525{
3526 std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(g_citeMutex);
3527 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3528 QCString name(yytext);
3529 if (yytext[0] =='"')
3530 {
3531 name=yytext+1;
3532 name=name.left((int)yyleng-2);
3533 }
3534 CitationManager::instance().insert(name);
3535}
3536
3537//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3538
3539// strip trailing whitespace (excluding newlines) from string s
3540static void stripTrailingWhiteSpace(QCString &s)
3541{
3542 uint32_t len = s.length();
3543 int i = (int)len-1;
3544 char c;
3545 while (i>=0)
3546 {
3547 c = s.at(i);
3548 if (c==' ' || c=='\t' || c=='\r') // normal whitespace
3549 {
3550 i--;
3551 }
3552 else if (c=='r' && i>=7 && qstrncmp("\\ilinebr",s.data()+i-7,8)==0) // special line break marker
3553 {
3554 i-=8;
3555 }
3556 else // non-whitespace
3557 {
3558 break;
3559 }
3560 }
3561 //printf("stripTrailingWhitespace(%s) i=%d len=%d\n",qPrint(s),i,len);
3562 if (i!=(int)len-1)
3563 {
3564 s.resize(i+2); // string up to and including char at pos i and \0 terminator
3565 }
3566}
3567
3568// selects the output to write to
3569static inline void setOutput(yyscan_t yyscanner,OutputContext ctx)
3570{
3571 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3572 bool xrefAppendToPrev = yyextra->xrefAppendFlag;
3573 // determine append flag for the next item (i.e. the end of this item)
3574 yyextra->xrefAppendFlag = !yyextra->inBody &&
3575 yyextra->inContext==OutputXRef && ctx==OutputXRef && // two consecutive xref items
3576 yyextra->newXRefKind==yyextra->xrefKind && // of the same kind
3577 (yyextra->xrefKind!=XRef_Item ||
3578 yyextra->newXRefItemKey==yyextra->xrefItemKey); // with the same key if \xrefitem
3579 //printf("%d && %d && %d && (%d || %d)\n",
3580 // yyextra->inContext==OutputXRef,
3581 // ctx==OutputXRef,
3582 // yyextra->newXRefKind==yyextra->xrefKind,
3583 // yyextra->xrefKind!=XRef_Item,
3584 // yyextra->newXRefItemKey==yyextra->xrefItemKey);
3585 //printf("refKind=%d yyextra->newXRefKind=%d xrefAppendToPrev=%d yyextra->xrefAppendFlag=%d\n",
3586 // yyextra->xrefKind,yyextra->newXRefKind,xrefAppendToPrev,yyextra->xrefAppendFlag);
3587
3588 //printf("setOutput(yyscanner,yyextra->inContext=%d ctx=%d)\n",yyextra->inContext,ctx);
3589 if (yyextra->inContext==OutputXRef) // end of XRef section => add the item
3590 {
3591 // See if we can append this new xref item to the previous one.
3592 // We know this at the start of the next item of the same
3593 // type and need to remember this until the end of that item.
3594 switch(yyextra->xrefKind)
3595 {
3596 case XRef_Todo:
3597 addXRefItem(yyscanner,QCString("todo"),
3598 theTranslator->trTodo(),
3599 theTranslator->trTodoList(),
3600 xrefAppendToPrev
3601 );
3602 break;
3603 case XRef_Test:
3604 addXRefItem(yyscanner,QCString("test"),
3605 theTranslator->trTest(),
3606 theTranslator->trTestList(),
3607 xrefAppendToPrev
3608 );
3609 break;
3610 case XRef_Bug:
3611 addXRefItem(yyscanner,QCString("bug"),
3612 theTranslator->trBug(),
3613 theTranslator->trBugList(),
3614 xrefAppendToPrev
3615 );
3616 break;
3617 case XRef_Deprecated:
3618 addXRefItem(yyscanner,QCString("deprecated"),
3619 theTranslator->trDeprecated(),
3620 theTranslator->trDeprecatedList(),
3621 xrefAppendToPrev
3622 );
3623 break;
3624 case XRef_Item: // user defined list
3625 addXRefItem(yyscanner,yyextra->xrefItemKey,
3626 yyextra->xrefItemTitle,
3627 yyextra->xrefListTitle,
3628 xrefAppendToPrev
3629 );
3630 break;
3631 case XRef_None:
3632 ASSERT(0);
3633 break;
3634 }
3635 }
3636 yyextra->xrefItemKey = yyextra->newXRefItemKey;
3637
3638 int oldContext = yyextra->inContext;
3639 yyextra->inContext = ctx;
3640 if (yyextra->inContext!=OutputXRef && yyextra->inBody) yyextra->inContext=OutputInbody;
3641 switch(yyextra->inContext)
3642 {
3643 case OutputDoc:
3644 if (oldContext!=yyextra->inContext)
3645 {
3646 stripTrailingWhiteSpace(yyextra->current->doc);
3647 if (yyextra->current->doc.isEmpty()) yyextra->current->docLine = yyextra->lineNr;
3648 if (yyextra->current->docFile.isEmpty())
3649 {
3650 yyextra->current->docFile = yyextra->fileName;
3651 yyextra->current->docLine = yyextra->lineNr;
3652 }
3653 }
3654 yyextra->pOutputString = &yyextra->current->doc;
3655 break;
3656 case OutputBrief:
3657 if (oldContext!=yyextra->inContext)
3658 {
3659 if (yyextra->current->brief.isEmpty()) yyextra->current->briefLine = yyextra->lineNr;
3660 if (yyextra->current->briefFile.isEmpty())
3661 {
3662 yyextra->current->briefFile = yyextra->fileName;
3663 yyextra->current->briefLine = yyextra->lineNr;
3664 }
3665 }
3666 if (yyextra->current->brief.stripWhiteSpace().isEmpty()) // we only want one brief
3667 // description even if multiple
3668 // are given...
3669 {
3670 yyextra->pOutputString = &yyextra->current->brief;
3671 }
3672 else
3673 {
3674 if (!yyextra->current->doc.isEmpty()) // when appending parts add a new line
3675 {
3676 yyextra->current->doc += "\n";
3677 }
3678 yyextra->pOutputString = &yyextra->current->doc;
3679 yyextra->inContext = OutputDoc; // need to switch to detailed docs, see bug 631380
3680 }
3681 break;
3682 case OutputXRef:
3683 yyextra->pOutputString = &yyextra->outputXRef;
3684 // first item found, so can't append to previous
3685 //yyextra->xrefAppendFlag = FALSE;
3686 break;
3687 case OutputInbody:
3688 yyextra->pOutputString = &yyextra->current->inbodyDocs;
3689 break;
3690 }
3691}
3692
3693
3694static void addAnchor(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &anchor, const QCString &title)
3695{
3696 std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(g_sectionMutex);
3697 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3698 SectionManager &sm = SectionManager::instance();
3699 const SectionInfo *si = sm.find(anchor);
3700 if (si)
3701 {
3702 if (!si->ref().isEmpty()) // we are from a tag file
3703 {
3704 si = sm.replace(anchor,yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,QCString(),SectionType::Anchor,0);
3705 yyextra->current->anchors.push_back(si);
3706 }
3707 else if (si->lineNr() != -1)
3708 {
3709 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
3710 "multiple use of section label '%s' while adding anchor, (first occurrence: %s, line %d)",
3711 qPrint(anchor),qPrint(si->fileName()),si->lineNr());
3712 }
3713 else
3714 {
3715 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"multiple use of section label '%s' while adding anchor, (first occurrence: %s)",
3716 qPrint(anchor),qPrint(si->fileName()));
3717 }
3718 }
3719 else
3720 {
3721 si = sm.add(anchor,yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,title,SectionType::Anchor,0);
3722 yyextra->current->anchors.push_back(si);
3723 }
3724}
3725
3726// add a string to the output
3727static inline void addOutput(yyscan_t yyscanner,const char *s)
3728{
3729 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3730 //printf("addOutput(yyscanner,%s)\n",s);
3731 *yyextra->pOutputString+=s;
3732}
3733
3734// add a string to the output
3735static inline void addOutput(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &s)
3736{
3737 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3738 //printf("addOutput(yyscanner,%s)\n",s);
3739 *yyextra->pOutputString+=s;
3740}
3741
3742// add a character to the output
3743static inline void addOutput(yyscan_t yyscanner,char c)
3744{
3745 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3746 *yyextra->pOutputString+=c;
3747}
3748
3749static void addIline(yyscan_t yyscanner,int lineNr)
3750{
3751 char cmd[20];
3752 qsnprintf(cmd,20,"\\iline %d ",lineNr);
3753 addOutput(yyscanner, cmd);
3754}
3755
3756static void addIlineBreak(yyscan_t yyscanner,int lineNr)
3757{
3758 char cmd[30];
3759 qsnprintf(cmd,30,"\\iline %d \\ilinebr ",lineNr);
3760 addOutput(yyscanner, cmd);
3761}
3762
3763static void endBrief(yyscan_t yyscanner,bool addToOutput)
3764{
3765 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3766 if (!yyextra->current->brief.stripWhiteSpace().isEmpty())
3767 { // only go to the detailed description if we have
3768 // found some brief description and not just whitespace
3769 yyextra->briefEndsAtDot=FALSE;
3770 setOutput(yyscanner,OutputDoc);
3771 addIline(yyscanner,yyextra->lineNr);
3772 if (addToOutput) addOutput(yyscanner,yytext);
3773 }
3774 else
3775 {
3776 int saveLineNr = yyextra->lineNr;
3777 lineCount(yyscanner);
3778 yyextra->current->briefLine = yyextra->lineNr;
3779 yyextra->lineNr = saveLineNr;
3780 }
3781}
3782
3783static int yyread(yyscan_t yyscanner,char *buf,int max_size)
3784{
3785 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3786 yyextra->prevPosition=yyextra->inputPosition;
3787 int c=0;
3788 while( c < max_size && yyextra->inputString[yyextra->inputPosition] )
3789 {
3790 *buf = yyextra->inputString[yyextra->inputPosition++] ;
3791 //printf("%d (%c)\n",*buf,*buf);
3792 c++; buf++;
3793 }
3794 return c;
3795}
3796
3797//----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3798
3799static void checkFormula(yyscan_t yyscanner)
3800{
3801 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3802 if (YY_START==ReadFormulaShort || YY_START==ReadFormulaRound || YY_START==ReadFormulaLong)
3803 {
3804 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"End of comment block while inside formula.");
3805 }
3806}
3807
3808//----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3809
3810struct CommentScanner::Private
3811{
3812 yyscan_t yyscanner;
3813 commentscanYY_state extra;
3814};
3815
3816CommentScanner::CommentScanner() : p(std::make_unique<Private>())
3817{
3818 commentscanYYlex_init_extra(&p->extra,&p->yyscanner);
3819#ifdef FLEX_DEBUG
3820 commentscanYYset_debug(Debug::isFlagSet(Debug::Lex_commentscan)?1:0,p->yyscanner);
3821#endif
3822}
3823
3824CommentScanner::~CommentScanner()
3825{
3826 commentscanYYlex_destroy(p->yyscanner);
3827}
3828
3829bool CommentScanner::parseCommentBlock(/* in */ OutlineParserInterface *parser,
3830 /* in */ Entry *curEntry,
3831 /* in */ const QCString &comment,
3832 /* in */ const QCString &fileName,
3833 /* in,out */ int &lineNr,
3834 /* in */ bool isBrief,
3835 /* in */ bool isAutoBriefOn,
3836 /* in */ bool isInbody,
3837 /* in,out */ Protection &prot,
3838 /* in,out */ int &position,
3839 /* out */ bool &newEntryNeeded,
3840 /* in */ bool markdownSupport
3841 )
3842{
3843 AUTO_TRACE("comment='{}' fileName={} lineNr={} isBrief={} isAutoBriefOn={} inInbody={}"
3844 " prot={} markdownSupport={}",Trace::trunc(comment),fileName,lineNr,isBrief,
3845 isAutoBriefOn,isInbody,prot,markdownSupport);
3846 yyscan_t yyscanner = p->yyscanner;
3847 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3848
3849 initParser(yyscanner);
3850 yyextra->guards = std::stack<GuardedSection>();
3851 yyextra->langParser = parser;
3852 yyextra->current = curEntry;
3853 yyextra->current->docLine = (lineNr > 1 ? lineNr : 1);
3854 if (comment.isEmpty()) return FALSE; // avoid empty strings
3855 yyextra->inputString = comment;
3856 yyextra->inputString.append(" ");
3857 yyextra->inputPosition = position;
3858 yyextra->lineNr = lineNr;
3859 yyextra->fileName = fileName;
3860 yyextra->protection = prot;
3861 yyextra->needNewEntry = FALSE;
3862 yyextra->xrefKind = XRef_None;
3863 yyextra->xrefAppendFlag = FALSE;
3864 yyextra->insidePre = FALSE;
3865 yyextra->parseMore = FALSE;
3866 yyextra->inBody = isInbody;
3867 yyextra->markdownSupport= markdownSupport;
3868 yyextra->outputXRef.resize(0);
3869 if (!isBrief && !isAutoBriefOn && !yyextra->current->doc.isEmpty())
3870 { // add newline separator between detailed comment blocks
3871 yyextra->current->doc += '\n';
3872 }
3873 setOutput(yyscanner, isBrief || isAutoBriefOn ? OutputBrief : OutputDoc );
3874 yyextra->briefEndsAtDot = isAutoBriefOn;
3875 yyextra->condCount = 0;
3876 yyextra->sectionLevel = 0;
3877 yyextra->spaceBeforeCmd.resize(0);
3878 yyextra->spaceBeforeIf.resize(0);
3879
3880 DebugLex debugLex(Debug::Lex_commentscan, __FILE__, !fileName.isEmpty() ? qPrint(fileName): NULL);
3881 if (!yyextra->current->inbodyDocs.isEmpty() && isInbody) // separate in body fragments
3882 {
3883 char cmd[30];
3884 qsnprintf(cmd,30,"\n\n\\iline %d \\ilinebr ",lineNr);
3885 yyextra->current->inbodyDocs+=cmd;
3886 }
3887
3888 Debug::print(Debug::CommentScan,0,"-----------\nCommentScanner: %s:%d\n"
3889 "input=[\n%s]\n",qPrint(fileName),lineNr,qPrint(yyextra->inputString)
3890 );
3891
3892 commentscanYYrestart( 0, yyscanner );
3893 BEGIN( Comment );
3894 commentscanYYlex(yyscanner);
3895 setOutput(yyscanner, OutputDoc );
3896
3897 if (YY_START==OverloadParam) // comment ended with \overload
3898 {
3899 addOutput(yyscanner,getOverloadDocs());
3900 }
3901
3902 if (!yyextra->guards.empty())
3903 {
3904 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,"Documentation block ended in the middle of a conditional section!");
3905 }
3906
3907 if (yyextra->insideParBlock)
3908 {
3909 warn(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,
3910 "Documentation block ended while inside a \\parblock. Missing \\endparblock");
3911 }
3912
3913 yyextra->current->doc=stripLeadingAndTrailingEmptyLines(yyextra->current->doc,yyextra->current->docLine);
3914
3915 if (yyextra->current->section==Entry::FILEDOC_SEC && yyextra->current->doc.isEmpty())
3916 {
3917 // to allow a comment block with just a @file command.
3918 yyextra->current->doc="\n\n";
3919 }
3920
3921 if (yyextra->current->section==Entry::MEMBERGRP_SEC &&
3922 yyextra->docGroup.isEmpty()) // @name section but no group started yet
3923 {
3924 yyextra->docGroup.open(yyextra->current,yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,true);
3925 }
3926
3927 Debug::print(Debug::CommentScan,0,"-----------\nCommentScanner: %s:%d\noutput=[\n"
3928 "brief=[line=%d\n%s]\ndocs=[line=%d\n%s]\ninbody=[line=%d\n%s]\n]\n===========\n",
3929 qPrint(fileName),lineNr,
3930 yyextra->current->briefLine,qPrint(yyextra->current->brief),
3931 yyextra->current->docLine,qPrint(yyextra->current->doc),
3932 yyextra->current->inbodyLine,qPrint(yyextra->current->inbodyDocs)
3933 );
3934
3935 checkFormula(yyscanner);
3936 prot = yyextra->protection;
3937
3938 yyextra->docGroup.addDocs(curEntry);
3939
3940 newEntryNeeded = yyextra->needNewEntry;
3941
3942 // if we did not proceed during this call, it does not make
3943 // sense to continue, since we get stuck. See bug 567346 for situations
3944 // were this happens
3945 if (yyextra->parseMore && position==yyextra->inputPosition) yyextra->parseMore=FALSE;
3946
3947 if (yyextra->parseMore) position=yyextra->inputPosition; else position=0;
3948
3949 lineNr = yyextra->lineNr;
3950 AUTO_TRACE_EXIT("position={} parseMore={} newEntryNeeded={}",
3951 position,yyextra->parseMore,newEntryNeeded);
3952
3953 return yyextra->parseMore;
3954}
3955
3956static void handleGuard(yyscan_t yyscanner,const QCString &expr)
3957{
3958 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)yyscanner;
3959 CondParser prs;
3960 bool sectionEnabled = false;
3961 if (!expr.isEmpty())
3962 {
3963 sectionEnabled=prs.parse(yyextra->fileName,yyextra->lineNr,expr.stripWhiteSpace());
3964 }
3965 bool parentEnabled = yyextra->guards.top().parentVisible();
3966 if (parentEnabled)
3967 {
3968 if (
3969 (sectionEnabled && yyextra->guardType==Guard_If) ||
3970 (!sectionEnabled && yyextra->guardType==Guard_IfNot)
3971 ) // section is visible
3972 {
3973
3974 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(true);
3975 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabledFound();
3976 BEGIN( GuardParamEnd );
3977 }
3978 else if (yyextra->guardType==Guard_ElseIf)
3979 {
3980 if (yyextra->guards.top().isEnabledFound())
3981 {
3982 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
3983 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
3984 }
3985 else if (sectionEnabled)
3986 {
3987 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(true);
3988 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabledFound();
3989 BEGIN( GuardParamEnd );
3990 }
3991 else
3992 {
3993 yyextra->guards.top().setEnabled(false);
3994 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
3995 }
3996 }
3997 else // section is invisible
3998 {
3999 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
4000 }
4001 }
4002 else // invisible because of parent
4003 {
4004 BEGIN( SkipGuardedSection );
4005 }
4006}
4007
4008void CommentScanner::initGroupInfo(Entry *entry)
4009{
4010 struct yyguts_t *yyg = (struct yyguts_t*)p->yyscanner;
4011 yyextra->docGroup.initGroupInfo(entry);
4012}

4029 yyextra->docGroup.enterCompound(fileName,lineNr,name);

4032void CommentScanner::leaveCompound(const QCString &fileName,int lineNr,const QCString &name)

4035 yyextra->docGroup.leaveCompound(fileName,lineNr,name);

4038void CommentScanner::open(Entry *e,const QCString &fileName,int lineNr,bool implicit)
4039{

4041 yyextra->docGroup.open(e,fileName,lineNr,implicit);
4042}
4043
4044void CommentScanner::close(Entry *e,const QCString &fileName,int lineNr,bool foundInline,bool implicit)
4045{

4047 yyextra->docGroup.close(e,fileName,lineNr,foundInline,implicit);
4048}
